tEn: Scaling Laws for Autoregressive Generative Modeling
tZh: 自回归生成建模的缩放定律
sEn: Scaling laws for autoregressive transformers show power-law improvements in cross-entropy loss across diverse domains, enabling predictions of optimal model size and performance.
sZh: 自回归Transformer在多个领域中的交叉熵损失遵循幂律加常数的缩放定律，可预测最优模型大小和性能。
absEn: We identify empirical scaling laws for the cross-entropy loss in four domains: generative image modeling, video modeling, multimodal image$\leftrightarrow$text models, and mathematical problem solving. In all cases autoregressive Transformers smoothly improve in performance as model size and compute budgets increase, following a power-law plus constant scaling law. The optimal model size also depends on the compute budget through a power-law, with exponents that are nearly universal across all data domains. The cross-entropy loss has an information theoretic interpretation as $S($True$) + D_{\mathrm{KL}}($True$||$Model$)$, and the empirical scaling laws suggest a prediction for both the true data distribution's entropy and the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. With this interpretation, billion-parameter Transformers are nearly perfect models of the YFCC100M image distribution downsampled to an $8\times 8$ resolution, and we can forecast the model size needed to achieve any given reducible loss (ie $D_{\mathrm{KL}}$) in nats/image for other resolutions. We find a number of additional scaling laws in specific domains: (a) we identify a scaling relation for the mutual information between captions and images in multimodal models, and show how to answer the question "Is a picture worth a thousand words?"; (b) in the case of mathematical problem solving, we identify scaling laws for model performance when extrapolating beyond the training distribution; (c) we finetune generative image models for ImageNet classification and find smooth scaling of the classification loss and error rate, even as the generative loss levels off. Taken together, these results strengthen the case that scaling laws have important implications for neural network performance, including on downstream tasks.
absZh: 我们确定了四个领域（生成图像建模、视频建模、多模态图像-文本模型和数学问题求解）中交叉熵损失的经验缩放定律。在所有情况下，自回归Transformer的性能随着模型大小和计算预算的增加而平滑提升，遵循幂律加常数的缩放定律。最优模型大小也通过幂律依赖于计算预算，其指数在所有数据域中几乎通用。交叉熵损失具有信息论解释：S(真实) + D_KL(真实||模型)，经验缩放定律预测了真实数据分布的熵以及真实分布与模型分布之间的KL散度。根据这一解释，数十亿参数的Transformer几乎是YFCC100M图像分布下采样到8×8分辨率的完美模型，我们可以预测达到任何给定可减少损失（即D_KL，单位为nats/图像）所需的其他分辨率的模型大小。我们在特定领域发现了额外的缩放定律：（a）我们确定了多模态模型中标题与图像之间互信息的缩放关系，并回答了“一图胜千言？”的问题；（b）在数学问题求解中，我们确定了模型在训练分布外推时的性能缩放定律；（c）我们对生成图像模型进行微调用于ImageNet分类，发现即使生成损失趋于平稳，分类损失和错误率仍平滑缩放。综合来看，这些结果强化了缩放定律对神经网络性能（包括下游任务）具有重要意义的观点。

contrib.en: Identifies empirical scaling laws for cross-entropy loss across four domains: image, video, multimodal, and math.
contrib.zh: 在图像、视频、多模态和数学四个领域识别出交叉熵损失的经验缩放定律。

contrib.en: Shows that optimal model size scales as a power-law with compute budget, with exponent ~0.7 across all domains.
contrib.zh: 表明最优模型大小随算力预算呈幂律缩放，指数约0.7，跨领域通用。

contrib.en: Interprets loss as entropy plus KL divergence, enabling prediction of irreducible loss and model size for target reducible loss.
contrib.zh: 将损失解释为熵加KL散度，可预测不可约损失及达到目标可约损失所需的模型大小。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that generative image models finetuned for classification show smooth scaling of loss and error rate with model size.
contrib.zh: 展示生成式图像模型微调用于分类时，损失和错误率随模型大小平滑缩放。

contrib.en: Finds scaling laws for mutual information in multimodal models, quantifying information gain between images and text.
contrib.zh: 发现多模态模型中互信息的缩放定律，量化图像与文本间的信息增益。

contrib.en: Shows that math problem extrapolation performance depends mainly on training distribution loss, not model size.
contrib.zh: 表明数学问题外推性能主要取决于训练分布损失，而非模型大小。

limits.en: Scaling laws may break down at very large scales due to optimization inefficiencies or data constraints.
limits.zh: 缩放定律在极大尺度下可能因优化效率或数据限制而失效。

limits.en: Results are limited to autoregressive Transformer models; other architectures may exhibit different scaling.
limits.zh: 结果仅限于自回归Transformer模型；其他架构可能表现出不同缩放行为。

limits.en: The interpretation of irreducible loss as entropy assumes infinite data and compute limits, which are not fully realized.
limits.zh: 将不可约损失解释为熵假设了无限数据和算力极限，实际中未完全实现。

limits.en: Extrapolation of scaling trends beyond tested ranges may be unreliable, especially for downstream tasks.
limits.zh: 将缩放趋势外推至测试范围之外可能不可靠，尤其对于下游任务。

limits.en: Mutual information estimates may be biased due to out-of-distribution inputs like blank captions or images.
limits.zh: 互信息估计可能因空白标题或图像等分布外输入而产生偏差。

full.secZh: 摘要

items.en: We identify empirical scaling laws for the cross-entropy loss in four domains: generative image modeling, video modeling, multimodal image↔↔\leftrightarrowtext models, and mathematical problem solving. In all cases autoregressive Transformers smoothly improve in performance as model size and compute budgets increase, following a power-law plus constant scaling law. The optimal model size also depends on the compute budget through a power-law, with exponents that are nearly universal across all data domains.
items.zh: 我们识别了四个领域中交叉熵损失的实证缩放定律：生成式图像建模、视频建模、多模态图像↔文本模型以及数学问题求解。在所有情况下，自回归Transformer在模型规模和算力预算增加时性能平滑提升，遵循幂律加常数的缩放定律。最优模型规模也通过幂律依赖于算力预算，其指数在所有数据领域中几乎通用。

items.en: The cross-entropy loss has an information theoretic interpretation as S(S(True)+DKL()+D_{\mathrm{KL}}(True||||Model))), and the empirical scaling laws suggest a prediction for both the true data distribution’s entropy and the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. With this interpretation, billion-parameter Transformers are nearly perfect models of the YFCC100M image distribution downsampled to an 8×8888\times 8 resolution, and we can forecast the model size needed to achieve any given reducible loss (ie DKLsubscript𝐷KLD_{\mathrm{KL}}) in nats/image for other resolutions.
items.zh: 交叉熵损失具有信息论解释为S(真实)+D_KL(真实||模型)，实证缩放定律为真实数据分布的熵以及真实分布与模型分布之间的KL散度提供了预测。根据这一解释，数十亿参数的Transformer几乎是YFCC100M图像分布下采样至8×8分辨率的完美模型，并且我们可以预测实现任何给定可约损失（即D_KL，单位为nats/图像）所需的其他分辨率的模型规模。

items.en: We find a number of additional scaling laws in specific domains: (a) we identify a scaling relation for the mutual information between captions and images in multimodal models, and show how to answer the question “Is a picture worth a thousand words?”; (b) in the case of mathematical problem solving, we identify scaling laws for model performance when extrapolating beyond the training distribution; (c) we finetune generative image models for ImageNet classification and find smooth scaling of the classification loss and error rate, even as the generative loss levels off. Taken together, these results strengthen the case that scaling laws have important implications for neural network performance, including on downstream tasks.
items.zh: 我们在特定领域发现了若干额外的缩放定律：(a) 我们识别了多模态模型中标题与图像之间互信息的缩放关系，并展示了如何回答“一图胜千言？”这一问题；(b) 在数学问题求解中，我们识别了模型在训练分布外推时的性能缩放定律；(c) 我们将生成式图像模型微调用于ImageNet分类，发现分类损失和错误率平滑缩放，即使生成损失趋于平稳。综合这些结果，进一步证明了缩放定律对神经网络性能（包括下游任务）具有重要影响。

full.secZh: 1 引言

items.en: Large scale models, datasets, and compute budgets have driven rapid progress in machine learning. Recent work [HNA+17, RRBS19, LWS+20, RDG+20, KMH+20, SK20, BMR+20] suggests that the benefits of scale are also highly predictable. When the cross-entropy loss L𝐿L of a language model is bottlenecked by either the compute budget C𝐶C, dataset size D𝐷D, or model size N𝑁N, the loss scales with each of these quantities as a simple power-law. Sample efficiency also improves with model size.
items.zh: 大规模模型、数据集和算力预算推动了机器学习的快速发展。近期工作[HNA+17, RRBS19, LWS+20, RDG+20, KMH+20, SK20, BMR+20]表明，规模带来的好处也是高度可预测的。当语言模型的交叉熵损失L受算力预算C、数据集大小D或模型规模N瓶颈限制时，损失随这些量按简单幂律缩放。样本效率也随模型规模提高。

items.en: These results raise a number of questions. Do they apply to all data modalities? How do improvements on the loss translate to improvements in representation quality and performance on downstream tasks? Is there any way to determine when and why the performance of a model might be maxed out, so that further scaling will be met with diminishing returns? What explains the precision and universality of these trends, and what else can we learn from them?
items.zh: 这些结果引发了一系列问题：它们是否适用于所有数据模态？损失的改进如何转化为表示质量和下游任务性能的提升？是否有办法确定模型性能何时以及为何达到上限，使得进一步缩放收益递减？是什么解释了这些趋势的精确性和普适性，我们还能从中学习到什么？

items.capEn: Figure 1: Smooth scaling of reducible loss across domains— We show power-law scaling laws for the reducible loss L−L∞𝐿subscript𝐿L-L_{\infty} as a function of compute, where the irreducible loss L∞subscript𝐿L_{\infty} is a fitted domain-dependent constant. Under plausible assumptions concerning the infinite data and compute limits, the irreducible loss estimates the entropy of the underlying data distribution, while the reducible loss approximates the KL divergence between the data and model distributions. In the case of language we use results from [BMR+20], and only show the full loss L𝐿L.
items.capZh: 图1：各领域可约损失的平滑缩放——我们展示了可约损失L−L∞随算力的幂律缩放定律，其中不可约损失L∞是拟合的领域相关常数。在关于无限数据和算力极限的合理假设下，不可约损失估计了底层数据分布的熵，而可约损失近似于数据分布与模型分布之间的KL散度。在语言领域，我们使用了[BMR+20]的结果，仅展示了完整损失L。

items.en: We will demonstrate that scaling laws apply to generative modeling across a wide variety of data modalities, including generative language [KMH+20, BMR+20], image [TSF+15, CRC+20], and video modeling [WTU19], multimodal modeling [TBL+19] of text-image correlations, and even mathematical problem solving [SGHK19], a task requiring a degree of reasoning ability. Moreover, we demonstrate that a single architecture – the Transformer [VSP+17, LSP+18], with an autoregressive cross-entropy loss – scales smoothly in all of these domains, with only minimal changes to hyperparameters such as width, depth, or learning rate. We also observe that larger models consistently learn faster, achieving any given value of the loss in fewer steps.
items.zh: 我们将证明缩放定律适用于多种数据模态的生成式建模，包括生成式语言[KMH+20, BMR+20]、图像[TSF+15, CRC+20]、视频建模[WTU19]、文本-图像相关性的多模态建模[TBL+19]，甚至需要一定推理能力的数学问题求解[SGHK19]。此外，我们证明单一架构——Transformer[VSP+17, LSP+18]（使用自回归交叉熵损失）——在所有领域中平滑缩放，仅需对超参数（如宽度、深度或学习率）进行最小调整。我们还观察到，更大的模型始终学习更快，能在更少的步骤中达到任何给定的损失值。

items.en: By studying many different model sizes N𝑁N, compute budgets C𝐶C, or dataset sizes D𝐷D, we demonstrate that the scaling relation for the loss
items.zh: 通过研究许多不同的模型规模N、算力预算C或数据集大小D，我们证明了损失L的缩放关系适用于每种数据模态，其中α_x是模态相关的缩放指数，我们主要研究x=N,C，偶尔涉及D。我们将L∞称为不可约损失，将幂律缩放项称为可约损失。这些缩放关系通常高度精确，即使可约损失远小于不可约损失；我们在图1中展示了可约损失的L(C)趋势。注意，在对数图上小的偏差会被视觉放大，但趋势拟合得非常好。

items.en: applies to each data modality, where αxsubscript𝛼𝑥\alpha_{x} is a modality-dependent scaling exponent, and we primarily study x=N,C,𝑥𝑁𝐶x=N,C, and occasionally D𝐷D. We will refer to L∞subscript𝐿L_{\infty} as the irreducible loss and the power-law scaling term as the reducible loss. These scaling relations often hold to high precision, even when the reducible loss is much smaller than the irreducible loss; we display trends in L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) for the reducible loss in figure 1. Note that small deviations are visually amplified on the log-plot, but nevertheless the trends fit remarkably well.
items.zh: 这些观察结果暗示了信息论解释：换句话说，不可约损失估计了真实数据分布的熵，而可约损失是真实分布与模型分布之间KL散度的估计。人们可能猜测，当L(x)曲线弯曲且损失接近L∞时，增加N,C,D的收益递减。但将可约损失等同于D_KL表明情况未必如此，进一步增加规模可能仍能提供重要的额外语义信息。为证明方程(1)，我们必须假设在D→∞随后N,C→∞的极限下，无限大的Transformer可以精确建模数据分布。

items.en: These observations suggest the information theoretic interpretation
items.zh: 图2：最优模型规模在各领域一致——我们展示了最优模型规模N_opt作为训练算力预算C的函数。N_opt(C)不仅表现为幂律，而且行为在所有数据模态中惊人地相似。

items.en: In other words, the irreducible loss estimates the entropy of the true data distribution, while the reducible loss is an estimate of the KL divergence between the true and model distributions. One might have guessed that as the L​(x)𝐿𝑥L(x) curve bends and the loss approaches L∞subscript𝐿L_{\infty}, returns to increasing N,C,D𝑁𝐶𝐷N,C,D are diminishing. But the identification of the reducible loss with DKLsubscript𝐷KLD_{\mathrm{KL}} suggests this is not necessarily the case, and further increases in scale may still provide important additional semantic information. To justify equation (1), we must assume that in the limit D→∞→𝐷D\to\infty followed111We specify this order of limits to make it clear that regularization will not be required. by N,C→∞→𝑁𝐶N,C\to\infty, an infinitely large transformer could model the data distribution exactly.
items.zh: 缩放定律提供了对数据复杂性的洞察，并阐明了增加N,D和C的价值。通过评估完整图像或视频的可约损失，我们实际上是在估计给定模型“尚待理解”的信息比特数。等价地，可约损失近似于数据可进一步压缩的程度。我们发现，数十亿参数的模型可以提取YFCC100M图像[TSF+15]下采样至8x8分辨率后除少数nats/图像外的所有信息，因此它们可能是该数据分布的近乎完美模型。对于更大、更实用的图像，我们需要更大的模型才能实现这一目标，但缩放定律使得精确预测成为可能。这些趋势与缩放指数α_x密切相关：较小的指数意味着随规模增加的改进较慢，即数据只能通过更大的模型进一步压缩。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Optimal model size is consistent across domains— We display the optimal model size Noptsubscript𝑁optN_{\rm opt} as a function of the training compute budget C𝐶C. Not only does Nopt​(C)subscript𝑁opt𝐶N_{\rm opt}(C) behave as a power-law, but the behavior is remarkably similar for all data modalities.
items.capZh: 损失随算力的缩放使得估计给定算力预算下的最优模型规模成为可能。我们发现，正如[KMH+20]中一样，该关系非常接近纯幂律N_opt(C)∝C^β。令人惊讶的是，指数β~0.7在所有领域中非常相似，如图2所示。这对计算最优训练中数据集大小随模型规模的缩放具有重要意义，表明如果每个数据元素只训练一次，则D∝N^0.4。即使允许显著误差或偏差，这也强烈表明数据集大小随模型规模呈次线性缩放。

items.en: The scaling relations provide insights into the complexity of the data and clarify the value of increasing N,D,𝑁𝐷N,D, and C𝐶C. By evaluating the reducible loss for a full image or video, we are actually estimating the number of bits of information that ‘remain to be understood’ by a given model. Equivalently, the reducible loss approximates the degree to which the data could be further compressed. We find that billion-parameter models can extract all but a few nats/image concerning YFCC100M images [TSF+15] downsampled to an 8x8 resolution, so they may be nearly perfect models of this data distribution. For larger, more practically relevant images we would need far larger models to achieve this feat, but the scaling laws make it possible to forecast this precisely. These trends are closely tied to the scaling exponents αxsubscript𝛼𝑥\alpha_{x}: smaller exponents imply slower improvement with increasing scale, meaning that the data can only be compressed further with much larger models.
items.zh: 如果我们关注每个数据模态特有的问题，可以学到更多。生成式图像模型可以微调用于分类。我们将展示ImageNet[CLH17]分类性能随预训练模型规模平滑提升，遵循另一个幂律。这一趋势甚至持续到生成损失趋势“弯曲”并受不可约分量主导的大模型区域。这强烈表明，从大型生成式图像模型中尽可能榨取性能是有益的，因为重要的语义信息可能存在于“最后几个比特”中。图像分类微调性能的平滑趋势暗示了一个更普遍的教训：无监督学习的缩放定律意味着下游性能也随模型规模和算力提升。

items.en: The scaling of loss with compute makes it possible to estimate the optimal model size for a given compute budget. We find that just as in [KMH+20] this relation is very nearly a pure power-law Nopt​(C)∝Cβproportional-tosubscript𝑁opt𝐶superscript𝐶𝛽N_{\rm opt}(C)\propto C^{\beta}. Surprisingly, the exponent β∼0.7similar-to𝛽0.7\beta\sim 0.7 is very similar for all domains, as shown in figure 2. This has important implications for the scaling of dataset size with model size for compute-optimal training, suggesting that D∝N0.4proportional-to𝐷superscript𝑁0.4D\propto N^{0.4} if we only train on each data element once. Even allowing for significant errors or deviations, this strongly suggests sub-linear scaling of dataset size with model size.
items.zh: 信息论为检查其他背景下的模型性能提供了有用的视角。一个显著的例子是多模态模型，例如建模文本标题与图像联合分布的模型。通常标题的熵远小于图像的熵，因此（经验）互信息与模型在文本上的损失之比（我们称之为信息增益）为模型性能提供了一个有趣的度量。分布之间共享的互信息必须小于任一分布中的信息量，因此该比值必须小于1。此外，信息增益似乎随模型规模平滑增加，因此信息增益<1的界限可以提示最大性能的目标模型规模。这通常远超当前能力。

items.en: We can learn more if we focus on questions specific to each data modality. Generative image models can be finetuned for classification. We will show that ImageNet [CLH17] classification performance improves smoothly with pre-trained model size, following another power law. This trend continues even into the large-model regime where the generative loss trend “bends” and becomes dominated by the irreducible component. This strongly suggests that there are benefits to squeezing as much performance as possible out of large generative image models, as significant semantic information may lie in the ‘last few bits’. The smooth trends for finetuned performance on image classification suggest a more general lesson: that the scaling laws for unsupervised learning imply that downstream performance also improves with model size and compute.
items.zh: 这些在多种数据集上的平滑缩放结果也展示了Transformer架构的显著通用性。

items.en: Information theory provides a useful lens for examining model performance in other contexts. A striking case is provided by multimodal models, such as those that model the joint distribution between text captions and images. Typically the entropy of the caption is much smaller than that of the image, so the ratio between the (empirical) mutual information222By the empirical mutual information we are referring to 𝔼x,y∼q​[log⁡p​(x,y)p​(x)​p​(y)]subscript𝔼similar-to𝑥𝑦𝑞delimited-[]𝑝𝑥𝑦𝑝𝑥𝑝𝑦\mathbb{E}_{x,y\sim q}\left[\log\frac{p(x,y)}{p(x)p(y)}\right] where p𝑝p is the model distribution and q𝑞q is the true distribution of the data. This must be smaller than the cross-entropy loss of the model on both X𝑋X and Y𝑌Y. and the model’s loss on the text, which we refer to as the
items.zh: 图3：随模型规模的缩放——我们展示了各领域随模型规模的缩放定律，以及对方程(1.1)的拟合（虚线）。注意，左上图中最大的语言模型[BMR+20]未训练至收敛，因此偏离趋势不一定有意义。视频和高分辨率图像的非常小的模型偏离趋势；我们推测这是由于这些模型试图关注与其非嵌入参数数量相当的上下文长度。

items.en: provides an interesting metric for model performance. The mutual information shared between distributions must be smaller than the amount of information in either distribution, so this ratio must be less than 111. Furthermore, it appears that the Infogain increases smoothly with model size, so that the bound Infogain<1Infogain1{\rm Infogain}<1 can suggest a target model size for maximum performance. Typically this is far beyond current capabilities.
items.zh: 我们将自回归解码器-only Transformer模型应用于所有数据模态，包括网络抓取的YFCC100M图像[TSF+15]（多种分辨率）、来自多种来源的视频数据、多模态图像+语言数据以及程序生成的数学问题。我们还引用了语言领域的先前结果[KMH+20, BMR+20]。在所有领域中，我们发现：

items.en: These smooth scaling results on a wide variety of datasets also demonstrate the remarkable versatility of the Transformer architecture.

items.capEn: Figure 3: Scaling with model size— We show scaling laws with model size for various domains, along with fits (dashed) to equation (1.1). Note that the largest language models [BMR+20] in the top-left figure were not trained to convergence, so deviations from the trend are not necessarily meaningful. Very small models for video and higher-resolution images are off-trend; we speculate this is due to these models attempting to attend to a context with length comparable to their non-embedding parameter count.

full.secZh: 1.1 结果概述

items.en: We apply autoregressive decoder-only Transformer models to all data modalities, which include web-scraped YFCC100M images [TSF+15] of various resolutions, video data from various sources, multimodal image+language data, and procedurally generated math problems. We also reference prior results on language [KMH+20, BMR+20]. Across all domains we find:

The scaling laws of equation (1.1) apply consistently, including for very small values of the reducible loss. Since the L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) trends can be extended to arbitrarily large data distributions, model sizes, and training steps, we argue that this supports the interpretation of equation (1).
items.zh: 公式(1.1)的缩放定律一致适用，包括在可约损失非常小的情况下。由于L(C)趋势可以扩展到任意大的数据分布、模型规模和训练步数，我们认为这支持了公式(1)的解释。

items.en: We identify the optimal model size Nopt​(C)subscript𝑁opt𝐶N_{\rm opt}(C) for a given compute budget, and find that it can be accurately modeled as a pure power law [KMH+20]
items.zh: 我们确定了给定算力预算下的最优模型规模Nopt(C)，并发现它可以被精确建模为纯幂律[KMH+20]，

items.en: with a power β∼0.7similar-to𝛽0.7\beta\sim 0.7 for all modalities, as shown in figure 2. As compute budgets grow, it’s best to devote a majority of resources towards training larger models. This strongly suggests sub-linear scaling of D∝N0.4proportional-to𝐷superscript𝑁0.4D\propto N^{0.4} for dataset size with model size during compute-optimal training.
items.zh: 其幂指数β∼0.7适用于所有模态，如图2所示。随着算力预算的增长，最好将大部分资源用于训练更大的模型。这强烈表明在算力最优训练中，数据集大小与模型规模呈次线性缩放关系D∝N^0.4。

items.en: For each domain, there is an optimal aspect ratio dmodel/nlayersubscript𝑑modelsubscript𝑛layerd_{\rm model}/n_{\rm layer} for the Transformer. Most data modalities require smaller aspect ratios (i.e. deeper networks) as compared to language [KMH+20].
items.zh: 对于每个领域，Transformer存在一个最优的纵横比d_model/n_layer。大多数数据模态需要比语言更小的纵横比（即更深的网络）[KMH+20]。

items.en: We study an apparent inconsistency between L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) and L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) trends in section 6.
items.zh: 我们在第6节研究了L(D)和L(C)趋势之间的明显不一致性。

items.en: We also find a number of results specific to certain domains, though we expect that many of the lessons are more general. For image and video modeling (see section 3):
items.zh: 我们还发现了一些特定领域的结果，尽管我们预计许多经验更具普遍性。对于图像和视频建模（见第3节）：

items.en: When generative image models are finetuned for ImageNet classification, we find a power-law for classification loss vs model size (see figure 11), even beyond the model size where we approach the irreducible loss for generative modeling. We conclude that the approach to the irreducible loss does not necessarily indicate diminishing returns for representation quality or semantic content.
items.zh: 当生成式图像模型针对ImageNet分类进行微调时，我们发现分类损失与模型规模之间存在幂律关系（见图11），即使模型规模已接近生成建模的不可约损失。我们得出结论，接近不可约损失并不一定意味着表示质量或语义内容的收益递减。

items.en: We explore scaling trends for individual images and for percentiles of the image loss distribution (see figures 17, 10, 20, 21). We find that the loss on individual images scales with model size in the same way as the mean over all images in the data distribution. We expect similar behavior in other data modalities.
items.zh: 我们探索了单个图像以及图像损失分布百分位数的缩放趋势（见图17、10、20、21）。我们发现，单个图像的损失随模型规模的变化方式与数据分布中所有图像的平均值相同。我们预计在其他数据模态中也有类似行为。

items.en: We test a variety of image resolutions (see figure 8), and find distinct scaling exponents and irreducible losses for each. We also test two VQVAE [vdOVK18] based models.
items.zh: 我们测试了多种图像分辨率（见图8），发现每种分辨率都有不同的缩放指数和不可约损失。我们还测试了两个基于VQVAE[vdOVK18]的模型。

items.en: We examine scaling of the loss with video frame index (see figures 6 and 9).
items.zh: 我们研究了损失随视频帧索引的缩放（见图6和图9）。

items.en: We explore the mutual information between captions and images (see figure 12), and the information gain defined in equation (1.3). We find a smooth scaling for both the mutual info and information gain with model size N𝑁N.
items.zh: 我们探索了标题与图像之间的互信息（见图12），以及公式(1.3)定义的信息增益。我们发现互信息和信息增益都随模型规模N平滑缩放。

items.en: We revisit the question “Is a picture worth a thousand words?” by comparing the information-content of textual captions to the image/text mutual information.
items.zh: 我们通过比较文本标题的信息内容与图像/文本互信息，重新审视了“一图胜千言”的问题。

items.en: For mathematical problem solving (see section 5 and appendix B):
items.zh: 对于数学问题求解（见第5节和附录B）：

items.en: We explore the ability of models to extrapolate from the training distribution to increasingly more challenging problems. We find that extrapolation performance depends predominantly on performance on the training distribution (figure 24), and is otherwise independent of model size. So while larger models perform better, model size does not provide benefits to ‘strong generalization’.
items.zh: 我们探索了模型从训练分布外推到越来越难的问题的能力。我们发现外推性能主要取决于训练分布上的性能（图24），而与模型规模无关。因此，虽然更大的模型表现更好，但模型规模并未带来“强泛化”的优势。

items.en: We provide a detailed breakdown of performance by math problem type (see appendix B).
items.zh: 我们按数学问题类型提供了详细的性能分解（见附录B）。

full.sec: 2 Central Empirical Scaling Laws in Each Domain
full.secZh: 2 各领域中的核心经验缩放定律

items.en: In this section we will describe our common experiments in each domain and our results establishing equation (1.1) for compute, model size, and (in a few cases) dataset size scaling.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将描述在每个领域的共同实验以及我们建立公式(1.1)关于算力、模型规模以及（在少数情况下）数据集规模缩放的结果。

full.secZh: 2.1 领域描述与训练设置

items.en: In every domain we use decoder-only transformer models trained using an autoregressive cross-entropy loss. For many models we use a sparse attention pattern [CGRS19], though we use dense attention when solving math problems.
items.zh: 在每个领域，我们使用仅解码器Transformer模型，通过自回归交叉熵损失进行训练。对于许多模型，我们使用稀疏注意力模式[CGRS19]，但在求解数学问题时使用密集注意力。

items.en: The transformers used for language and multimodal modeling have fully connected layers of size 4​dmodel4subscript𝑑model4d_{\rm model} and attention layers of size dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\rm model}, in the notation of [KMH+20, BMR+20]. For math, image, and video modeling we scale the FC layers to dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\rm model} and the attention layers to dmodel/4subscript𝑑model4d_{\rm model}/4. We use an aspect ratio dmodel/nlayer≈10subscript𝑑modelsubscript𝑛layer10d_{\rm model}/n_{\rm layer}\approx 10 for math, images, and videos as we find that this is approximately optimal, meaning that these domains prefer much deeper models as compared to language [KMH+20], where the optimal aspect ratio ∼100similar-toabsent100\sim 100. Thus our math, image, and video models are essentially identical, differing only in context length. For math alone we used a weight decay [LH17] of 0.050.050.05. We provide more detailed hyperparameter settings in appendix F.
items.zh: 用于语言和多模态建模的Transformer具有大小为4d_model的全连接层和大小为d_model的注意力层，采用[KMH+20, BMR+20]的符号。对于数学、图像和视频建模，我们将全连接层缩放到d_model，注意力层缩放到d_model/4。对于数学、图像和视频，我们使用纵横比d_model/n_layer≈10，因为我们发现这近似最优，这意味着这些领域比语言[KMH+20]更喜欢更深的模型，语言的最优纵横比约为100。因此，我们的数学、图像和视频模型本质上是相同的，仅在上下文长度上有所不同。仅对数学，我们使用了0.05的权重衰减[LH17]。我们在附录F中提供了更详细的超参数设置。

items.en: We show results from GPT-3 [BMR+20] for comparison, including the performance of much larger models than we train in other domains. In figure 2 we use the optimal model size trend from [KMH+20]. In appendix D we show some experiments on the scaling of arithmetic and factual question answering abilities, and make some additional qualitative observations about the progression of language understanding with scale.
items.zh: 我们展示了GPT-3[BMR+20]的结果以作比较，包括我们在其他领域训练的更大模型的性能。在图2中，我们使用了来自[KMH+20]的最优模型规模趋势。在附录D中，我们展示了一些关于算术和事实问答能力缩放的实验，并对语言理解随规模发展的进程进行了一些额外的定性观察。

items.en: We study a dataset of approximately 108superscript10810^{8} web images [TSF+15] scaled to pixel resolutions R×R𝑅𝑅R\times R = 8x8, 16x16, and 32x32 represented in raster order using RGB colors, each in the range [0,255]0255[0,255], giving a total of 3​R23superscript𝑅23R^{2} tokens per image. We also study the same images at 64x64 resolution but VQ [vdOVK18] encoded with either a 16x16 or 32x32 VQ encoding pattern, for a total of either 256 or 1024 tokens per image. To reduce compute, we use sparse attention patterns [CGRS19], alternating between locally-banded attention and fixed-stride attention in sequential layers, where both the local context length and fixed-stride length are given by the side-length in tokens of the square images.
items.zh: 我们研究了一个包含约10^8张网络图像的数据集[TSF+15]，这些图像被缩放到像素分辨率R×R = 8x8、16x16和32x32，以光栅顺序使用RGB颜色表示，每个颜色在[0,255]范围内，每张图像总共3R^2个token。我们还研究了相同图像在64x64分辨率下，但使用VQ[vdOVK18]编码为16x16或32x32的VQ编码模式，每张图像总共256或1024个token。为了减少算力，我们使用稀疏注意力模式[CGRS19]，在连续层中交替使用局部带状注意力和固定步长注意力，其中局部上下文长度和固定步长长度均由方形图像的边长（以token计）给出。

items.en: We study a dataset of approximately 7×1057superscript1057\times 10^{5} videos totaling about 100100100 hours scraped from the web, where each frame is scaled to a pixel resolution of 64x64. Each individual frame is encoded with the same 16x16 VQVAE [vdOVK18] used for images, resulting in 256 tokens per frame. We train on sequences of 16 sequential frames, resulting in a total of 4096 tokens per video. As with images, we reduce compute by using a sparse attention pattern [CGRS19] alternating between locally-banded and fixed-stride attention, where both the local context length and fixed-stride length are given by the side length in tokens of the square frames.
items.zh: 我们研究了一个包含约 7×10⁵ 个视频、总计约 100 小时的数据集，这些视频从网络抓取，每帧缩放至 64x64 像素分辨率。每个帧使用与图像相同的 16x16 VQVAE [vdOVK18] 编码，每帧产生 256 个 token。我们在 16 个连续帧的序列上训练，每个视频共 4096 个 token。与图像类似，我们通过使用稀疏注意力模式 [CGRS19] 来减少算力，该模式在局部带状注意力和固定步长注意力之间交替，局部上下文长度和固定步长长度均由方形帧的 token 边长给出。

items.en: The VQVAE models mentioned in 2.1.2 and 2.1.3 were trained on frames of the web-scraped videos described in 2.1.3, using the VQ-VAE architecture [vdOVK18] with modifications described in [DJP+20], including dead code revival. More details can be found in table 2.
items.zh: 2.1.2 和 2.1.3 节中提到的 VQVAE 模型在 2.1.3 节描述的网络抓取视频帧上训练，使用 VQ-VAE 架构 [vdOVK18] 并采用 [DJP+20] 中描述的修改，包括死代码复活。更多细节见表 2。

items.en: Multimodal models are trained to autoregressively predict both image tokens and language tokens in series. We simply concatenate together the token lists for BPE encoding of text (using the tokenization of [BMR+20]) and the [0,255]0255[0,255] colorscale of each of the RGB pixels in the images, and let the model learn the necessary embedding matrix. We separately study models for text-to-image and image-to-text mappings, as we found poor performance for bidirectional models in preliminary experiments. For both image-to-text and text-to-image models we compute the mean pixel and mean text token loss, and then weight them to form the total loss L=9​Limage+Ltext𝐿9subscript𝐿imagesubscript𝐿textL=9L_{\rm image}+L_{\rm text}, as we found this weighting produced good results in a scan. We use 32x32 images together with a 128-token captions (padded or trimmed as needed), for a total context length of 320032003200 tokens per image/caption pair. For the multimodal dataset we used a wide variety of image/text pairs curated through web search.
items.zh: 多模态模型被训练为自回归地依次预测图像 token 和语言 token。我们简单地将文本的 BPE 编码（使用 [BMR+20] 的分词方法）的 token 列表与图像中每个 RGB 像素的 [0,255] 颜色尺度连接起来，让模型学习必要的嵌入矩阵。我们分别研究了文本到图像和图像到文本映射的模型，因为在初步实验中我们发现双向模型性能较差。对于图像到文本和文本到图像模型，我们计算平均像素损失和平均文本 token 损失，然后加权形成总损失 L=9L_image+L_text，因为我们发现这种加权在扫描中产生了良好结果。我们使用 32x32 图像和 128 token 的标题（根据需要填充或裁剪），每个图像/标题对的总上下文长度为 3200 token。对于多模态数据集，我们使用了通过网络搜索精选的各种图像/文本对。

items.en: Mathematical problem solving would seem to be a rather different domain from generative language, image, video, and multimodal modeling. To solve math problems, a model needs to learn to execute an algorithm to arrive at a deterministic answer. In contrast, the other distributions we have studied are typically genuinely probabilistic, and at least at an intuitive level, seem to require something a bit different from the simple algorithms that perform arithmetic or solve equations. We have included math problems to probe the generality of scaling laws and transformer performance.
items.zh: 数学问题求解似乎是一个与生成语言、图像、视频和多模态建模截然不同的领域。为了解决数学问题，模型需要学习执行算法以得出确定性答案。相比之下，我们研究的其他分布通常是真正概率性的，至少在直观层面上，似乎需要与执行算术或求解方程的简单算法略有不同的东西。我们将数学问题纳入研究，以探究缩放定律和 Transformer 性能的普适性。

items.en: We train and test models using the math problem generator [SGHK19], which generates a variety of problems in algebra, arithmetic, calculus, comparisons, numbers (integer properties), measurement, polynomials, and probability. When studying model and compute-budget scaling we procedurally generate the training problems in an online setting. We sample the default mixture of easy, medium, and hard problems, without a progressive curriculum. When studying dataset size scaling we use static training data sampled from the same distribution. As discussed further in appendix B, the data distribution has some unusual features, as easier problems will naturally appear more often than more difficult problems.
items.zh: 我们使用数学问题生成器 [SGHK19] 训练和测试模型，该生成器生成代数、算术、微积分、比较、数字（整数性质）、测量、多项式和概率等各种问题。在研究模型和算力预算缩放时，我们在线方式程序化生成训练问题。我们采样默认的简单、中等和困难问题混合，没有渐进式课程。在研究数据集大小缩放时，我们使用从相同分布采样的静态训练数据。如附录 B 进一步讨论，数据分布具有一些不寻常的特征，因为简单问题自然比困难问题出现得更频繁。

items.en: A few problem types require interpreting both numbers and strings as sequences of individual characters, so for simplicity we model all questions and responses at the character (byte) level. The model receives the problems as plain text, and we fill a transformer’s 512512512-token context window with concatenated problems, using a mask so that only the tokens corresponding to answers contribute to the loss.
items.zh: 少数问题类型需要将数字和字符串都解释为单个字符序列，因此为简单起见，我们在字符（字节）级别对所有问题和回答进行建模。模型接收纯文本形式的问题，我们将 Transformer 的 512 token 上下文窗口填充为连接的问题，并使用掩码使得只有对应回答的 token 贡献损失。

items.en: The problem generator333The generator settings vary somewhat among problem types, with some depending on more parameters. [SGHK19] can be provided with an ‘entropy’ s𝑠s. The training distribution samples from s∈[3,10]𝑠310s\in[3,10], while interpolate-testing corresponds to s=8𝑠8s=8, and the extrapolate test involves s=12𝑠12s=12, along with some other extensions to increase compositionality. In the online setting, we cannot be sure the interpolate tests are deduplicated from the training data, but the extrapolate test must be. To supplement the test data and further study extrapolation, we generated new test sets with s∈[1,19]𝑠119s\in[1,19], with larger s𝑠s posing a greater challenge to the model, as s>10𝑠10s>10 is literally out of the training distribution, and requires extrapolation.
items.zh: 问题生成器³ [SGHK19] 可以提供一个‘熵’参数 s。训练分布从 s∈[3,10] 中采样，而插值测试对应 s=8，外推测试涉及 s=12，以及一些其他扩展以增加组合性。在线设置中，我们无法确定插值测试是否与训练数据去重，但外推测试必须去重。为了补充测试数据并进一步研究外推，我们生成了 s∈[1,19] 的新测试集，较大的 s 对模型构成更大挑战，因为 s>10 严格超出训练分布，需要外推。

items.en: We found consistently poor performance on the two extrapolation generators probability__swr_p_level_set_more_samples and probability__swr_p_sequence_more_samples from [SGHK19], with larger models overfitting against them and achieving worse loss (but higher accuracy) than some smaller models. So we have not included their contribution in figures 1 and 5, as the poor loss on these modules would dominate the trends.
items.zh: 我们发现 [SGHK19] 中的两个外推生成器 probability__swr_p_level_set_more_samples 和 probability__swr_p_sequence_more_samples 性能持续较差，较大模型对其过拟合，损失更差（但准确率更高）比某些较小模型。因此我们在图 1 和图 5 中未包含它们的贡献，因为这些模块的较差损失会主导趋势。

items.en: We provide more details and many additional results on math in appendix B, including results per module, dataset size444The math models in figure 4 used mm​l​p=4,ma​t​t​n=1formulae-sequencesubscript𝑚𝑚𝑙𝑝4subscript𝑚𝑎𝑡𝑡𝑛1m_{mlp}=4,m_{attn}=1 like language models, unlike the math models used to study model and compute scaling, as these aspect ratio tests were performed earlier. scaling, and further analysis of performance vs difficulty level. There we also show trends for the training loss, which do not adhere as well to a power-law form, perhaps because of the implicit curriculum in the frequency distribution of easy and hard problems.
items.zh: 我们在附录 B 中提供了更多细节和许多额外数学结果，包括每个模块的结果、数据集大小⁴ 缩放以及性能与难度水平的进一步分析。在那里我们还展示了训练损失的趋势，这些趋势不太符合幂律形式，可能是因为简单和困难问题频率分布中的隐式课程。

full.sec: 2.2 Model Size Scaling and Aspect Ratios
full.secZh: 2.2 模型规模缩放与宽高比

items.en: Arguably the simplest scaling relation compares the loss achieved by models of various sizes N𝑁N once they are trained to convergence with a dataset large enough to obviate overfitting. Throughout this paper we report N𝑁N as the number of non-embedding parameters in a transformer model, motivated by prior results on language [KMH+20]. Results for the scaling of L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) are depicted in figure 3, along with fits to equation (1.1).
items.zh: 可以说，最简单的缩放关系是比较各种大小 N 的模型在足够大的数据集上训练至收敛（避免过拟合）后达到的损失。在本文中，我们将 N 报告为 Transformer 模型中非嵌入参数的数量，这是基于先前关于语言的结果 [KMH+20]。L(N) 的缩放结果如图 3 所示，并附有对公式 (1.1) 的拟合。

items.en: We define L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) using the loss at convergence (practically, this means as close to convergence as is feasible), but the largest models we study will not have fully converged. Thus caution is warranted when interpreting L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) trends according to equation (1) and identifying the irreducible loss as an entropy, and the reducible loss as a KL divergence. Nevertheless, the reducible losses typically fit very well to a pure power-law trend. As an aside, we often find intriguingly good power-law plus constant trends when recording the loss after training all models for a fixed number of training steps.
items.zh: 我们使用收敛时的损失（实际上，尽可能接近收敛）定义 L(N)，但我们研究的最大的模型尚未完全收敛。因此，在根据公式 (1) 解释 L(N) 趋势并将不可约损失视为熵、可约损失视为 KL 散度时需谨慎。尽管如此，可约损失通常很好地符合纯幂律趋势。顺便提一下，当记录所有模型在固定训练步数后的损失时，我们经常发现幂律加常数趋势拟合得非常好。

items.en: We have found that for any given data modality, transformer models typically have an ideal aspect ratio dmodel/nlayersubscript𝑑modelsubscript𝑛layerd_{\rm model}/n_{\rm layer} that maximizes performance while holding model size N𝑁N fixed. In figure 4 we display converged performance as a function of aspect ratio for a few model sizes in several domains. We see that image and math models perform optimally with an aspect ratio ≈5absent5\approx 5, which suggests that on these domains we should aim for deeper and thinner models, with at least a 10x smaller aspect ratio compared to optimized language models. The difference may be even greater due variations in mattnsubscript𝑚attnm_{\rm attn} and mmlpsubscript𝑚mlpm_{\rm mlp} settings.
items.zh: 我们发现，对于任何数据模态，Transformer 模型通常有一个理想的长宽比 d_model/n_layer，在固定模型大小 N 时最大化性能。在图 4 中，我们展示了几个领域中不同模型大小的收敛性能与长宽比的关系。我们看到图像和数学模型在长宽比 ≈5 时表现最优，这表明在这些领域我们应该追求更深更窄的模型，长宽比至少比优化的语言模型小 10 倍。由于 m_attn 和 m_mlp 设置的变化，差异可能更大。

items.en: Finally, note that image and video models with roughly 104superscript10410^{4} parameters under-perform the trends, with worse performance evident for higher resolution images. The video models must attend to a 409640964096-token context, while 32x32 images have a 307230723072-token context, so we speculate that tiny models under-perform because they have difficulty attending to contexts comparable in length to their non-embedding parameter count.
items.zh: 最后，注意参数约 10⁴ 的图像和视频模型性能低于趋势，更高分辨率图像的表现更差。视频模型必须处理 4096 token 的上下文，而 32x32 图像有 3072 token 的上下文，因此我们推测小模型性能不佳是因为它们难以处理与其非嵌入参数数量相当的上下文长度。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Optimal aspect ratio— We show trained performance as a function of the aspect ratio, defined as width / depth, or more precisely ≡dmodel/nlayerabsentsubscript𝑑modelsubscript𝑛layer\equiv d_{\rm model}/n_{\rm layer}. The optimal aspect ratio for language [KMH+20] was about 10x larger.
items.capZh: 图 4：最优长宽比——我们展示了训练性能与长宽比（定义为宽度/深度，更精确地 ≡ d_model/n_layer）的关系。语言 [KMH+20] 的最优长宽比大约大 10 倍。

full.sec: 2.3 Compute Scaling and Optimal Model Sizes
full.secZh: 2.3 计算量缩放与最优模型规模

items.capEn: Figure 5: Scaling laws with compute— Scaling laws with compute (total estimated floating point operations) for various domains, along with power-law plus constant fits (dashed). This is identical to figure 1, except that we do not subtract the fitted constant irreducible loss. Note that very small models underperform compared to the trends when they model images or videos with very large contexts. Note also that the largest language models [BMR+20] were not trained to convergence.
items.capZh: 图 5：算力缩放定律——不同领域的算力（总估计浮点运算次数）缩放定律，以及幂律加常数拟合（虚线）。这与图 1 相同，只是我们没有减去拟合的常数不可约损失。注意，非常小的模型在对具有非常大上下文的图像或视频建模时性能低于趋势。还注意，最大的语言模型 [BMR+20] 未训练至收敛。

items.en: Instead of focusing on converged performance, one can study the loss L𝐿L achieved with a finite training compute budget C𝐶C when training with a large enough dataset to avoid overfitting. We define C𝐶C theoretically rather than empirically, and approximate555The factor of 6 includes a factor of 2 for add-multiply and a 3 to include forward and backward passes. it as C≡6​N​E𝐶6𝑁𝐸C\equiv 6NE where N𝑁N is the non-embedding parameter count (model size) and E=S​B𝐸𝑆𝐵E=SB is the total number of tokens processed during training (with S𝑆S the number of parameter updates and B𝐵B the batch size in tokens). The results for L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) from a variety of model sizes are depicted in figure 5, along with the pareto-frontier of optimal loss for a given compute budget, and a power-law plus constant fit forced to lie below this frontier.
items.zh: 除了关注收敛性能，还可以研究在有限训练算力预算 C 下，使用足够大的数据集避免过拟合时达到的损失 L。我们从理论上而非经验上定义 C，并近似⁵ 为 C≡6NE，其中 N 是非嵌入参数计数（模型大小），E=SB 是训练期间处理的总 token 数（S 是参数更新次数，B 是以 token 为单位的批量大小）。不同模型大小的 L(C) 结果如图 5 所示，包括给定算力预算下最优损失的帕累托前沿，以及强制位于该前沿下方的幂律加常数拟合。

items.en: The compute trends are most relevant for differentiating between the irreducible loss and reducible losses, since they avoid the issue of training to convergence, which makes the interpretation of L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) difficult. We display the reducible loss trends for L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) in figure 1, and emphasize that these appear to be pure power-laws, even when the reducible loss is much smaller than the irreducible loss.
items.zh: 算力趋势对于区分不可约损失和可约损失最为相关，因为它们避免了训练至收敛的问题，这使得 L(N) 的解释变得困难。我们在图 1 中展示了 L(C) 的可约损失趋势，并强调这些趋势似乎是纯幂律，即使可约损失远小于不可约损失。

items.en: We can use the L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) trends to estimate the model size Noptsubscript𝑁optN_{\rm opt} that optimizes the loss when training is constrained by a fixed compute666For a fixed amount of training compute, we can train smaller models at the expense of worse performance. Hence, when accounting for both inference and training compute, the optimal model size may be somewhat smaller than described here. See [KMH+20] for a discussion this tradeoff. budget C𝐶C. For this purpose we select points on the convex hull of the loss versus compute frontier; these can be seen as blue points in figure 5. The results for all domains together appear in figure 2, while each domain is shown separately with individual fits in figure 16. In all cases we find that Nopt​(C)∝Cβproportional-tosubscript𝑁opt𝐶superscript𝐶𝛽N_{\rm opt}(C)\propto C^{\beta} can be fit with a pure power-law, with all exponents fairly close to β∼0.7similar-to𝛽0.7\beta\sim 0.7. This suggests that one should spend most of a growing training compute budget by training much larger generative models.
items.zh: 我们可以使用 L(C) 趋势来估计在固定算力⁶ 预算 C 下优化损失的模型大小 N_opt。为此，我们选择损失与算力前沿凸包上的点；这些点在图 5 中显示为蓝色点。所有领域的结果一起出现在图 2 中，而每个领域单独显示在图 16 中并附有单独拟合。在所有情况下，我们发现 N_opt(C)∝C^β 可以用纯幂律拟合，所有指数都相当接近 β∼0.7。这表明应该将不断增长的训练算力预算的大部分用于训练更大的生成模型。

items.en: When estimating Nopt​(C)subscript𝑁opt𝐶N_{\rm opt}(C), one might worry about errors due to a sub-optimal usage of data. Specifically, if the batch size is too large early in training, then some compute may effectively be wasted. This can be studied by identifying the critical batch size [MBB17, MKAT18] above which there are diminishing returns to further data parallelism. In prior work [KMH+20] this was taken into account by measuring the critical batch size and using relations derived in [MKAT18] to adjust compute estimates. We have not made this adjustment here, as it would require a number of additional experiments in order to measureme the critical batch size in each domain. For large model sizes and compute budgets these effects should be small, because most or all of training involves batches smaller than the critical batch size (which grows quickly during training [MKAT18]), but this issue may be worth revisiting in the future.
items.zh: 在估计 N_opt(C) 时，可能会担心由于数据使用次优而导致的误差。具体来说，如果训练初期批量大小太大，一些算力可能被浪费。这可以通过识别临界批量大小 [MBB17, MKAT18] 来研究，超过该大小后进一步的数据并行性收益递减。在先前的工作 [KMH+20] 中，通过测量临界批量大小并使用 [MKAT18] 中推导的关系调整算力估计来考虑这一点。我们这里没有进行这种调整，因为需要在每个领域进行额外实验来测量临界批量大小。对于大的模型大小和算力预算，这些影响应该很小，因为大部分或全部训练涉及小于临界批量大小的批次（该大小在训练期间快速增长 [MKAT18]），但这个问题可能值得将来重新审视。

items.en: The total number of tokens processed during all of training is E=C6​N≥D𝐸𝐶6𝑁𝐷E=\frac{C}{6N}\geq D, where D𝐷D is the dataset size, with equality representing training for only a single epoch. This means that D∝C1−β∝N1−ββproportional-to𝐷superscript𝐶1𝛽proportional-tosuperscript𝑁1𝛽𝛽D\propto C^{1-\beta}\propto N^{\frac{1-\beta}{\beta}}. We clearly have β>0.6𝛽0.6\beta>0.6 for all data modalities and by a comfortable margin, suggesting that dataset size should not grow faster than D∝N2/3proportional-to𝐷superscript𝑁23D\propto N^{2/3} during compute-optimal training, with a more reasonable median estimate of D∝N0.4proportional-to𝐷superscript𝑁0.4D\propto N^{0.4}. This unambiguously sub-linear scaling across all data modalities runs somewhat counter to conventional wisdom. As a word of caution, we have yet to train models in a regime where compute optimal training actually implies D≪Nmuch-less-than𝐷𝑁D\ll N numerically. We discuss this further in section 6.
items.zh: 整个训练期间处理的总 token 数为 E=C/(6N)≥D，其中 D 是数据集大小，等号表示仅训练一个 epoch。这意味着 D∝C^(1-β)∝N^((1-β)/β)。我们清楚地看到所有数据模态的 β>0.6 且有余量，这表明在算力最优训练期间，数据集大小不应增长快于 D∝N^(2/3)，更合理的中间估计为 D∝N^0.4。这种在所有数据模态上明确次线性的缩放与常规认知有些相悖。作为提醒，我们尚未在算力最优训练实际上意味着 D≪N 数值上的情况下训练模型。我们在第 6 节进一步讨论这一点。

full.sec: 2.4 Loss versus Position in the Context Depends on the Structure of the Data
full.secZh: 2.4 上下文中的损失位置取决于数据结构

items.en: Some trends in the loss are highly dependent on the structure of the data. A clear example of this is the loss as a function of the position in the context, ie the loss per token for language models, loss per frame for video models, or the loss per pixel in visual domains. We provide two examples in figure 6. Note that for images the very first pixel typically has a large loss, outside the color range shown; we chose not to extend the color range as it would have obscured the patterns in the remainder of the image.
items.zh: 损失中的某些趋势高度依赖于数据的结构。一个明显的例子是损失作为上下文位置的函数，即语言模型的每个词元损失、视频模型的每帧损失或视觉域中的每像素损失。我们在图6中提供了两个示例。请注意，对于图像，第一个像素通常具有较大的损失，超出了显示的颜色范围；我们选择不扩展颜色范围，因为这会掩盖图像其余部分的模式。

items.en: Language [KMH+20] and videos (per frame) show a power-law plus constant trend as a function of context position, as their data is naturally sequential. However, these trends do not apply at all to image modeling, where the loss is largest for the first pixels and near the center of the image. Thus power-law correlations in the context depend in an essential way on the nature of the data, and are not universal. In contrast, the form of the compute and model size scaling laws appears to be largely independent of the data distribution.
items.zh: 语言[KMH+20]和视频（每帧）显示出作为上下文位置函数的幂律加常数趋势，因为其数据本质上是序列化的。然而，这些趋势完全不适用于图像建模，其中损失在第一个像素和图像中心附近最大。因此，上下文中的幂律相关性本质上依赖于数据的性质，并非普遍存在。相比之下，算力和模型大小的缩放定律形式似乎在很大程度上独立于数据分布。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Position-dependent loss for images and video— We show trends for the loss as a function of position in the context for image and video models. On the left we have the mean loss over the three colors for images of various resolutions. The top-left pixel actually has significantly higher loss, off the color scale, which was set to make the pattern clear for the image as a whole. On the right we see the mean loss per frame for video models, as a function of the frame index. The oscillatory behavior per frame is due to the video encoding.
items.capZh: 图6：图像和视频的位置相关损失——我们展示了图像和视频模型中损失作为上下文位置函数的趋势。左侧是不同分辨率图像在三个颜色通道上的平均损失。左上角像素实际上具有显著更高的损失，超出了颜色标度范围，该标度被设定为使整个图像的模式清晰可见。右侧我们看到视频模型每帧的平均损失，作为帧索引的函数。每帧的振荡行为是由于视频编码所致。

full.sec: 3 Image and Video Modeling, the Reducible Loss, and Downstream Tasks
full.secZh: 3 图像与视频建模、可约损失及下游任务

items.en: Image data can be presented at a wide variety of resolutions, or it may be compressed, for example with VQ codes [vdOVK18]. These settings provide a way to modify the complexity of the data distribution, creating a useful arena for the study of neural scaling laws. Furthermore, we can finetune generative image models for classification to explore the quality of their learned features.
items.zh: 图像数据可以以多种分辨率呈现，或者可以被压缩，例如使用VQ编码[vdOVK18]。这些设置提供了一种修改数据分布复杂性的方法，为研究神经缩放定律创造了有用的领域。此外，我们可以微调生成式图像模型用于分类，以探索其学习特征的质量。

items.en: We will use these tools to explore the nature of the reducible and irreducible loss. In particular, at very low resolution (8x8) we can follow the power-law trend in the reducible loss all the way to a few nats/image, which can be achieved by models approaching a billion parameters. This gives us some reason for optimism when extrapolating similar trends on larger images beyond the realm that we can currently explore. It also strongly suggests that the power-law plus constant form of equation (1.1) will remain an excellent approximation.
items.zh: 我们将使用这些工具来探索可约损失和不可约损失的性质。特别是，在非常低的分辨率（8x8）下，我们可以将可约损失中的幂律趋势一直跟踪到几个nats/图像，这可以通过接近十亿参数的模型实现。这让我们在将类似趋势外推到目前无法探索的更大图像时有一些理由感到乐观。这也强烈表明方程(1.1)的幂律加常数形式仍将是一个极好的近似。

items.en: Furthermore, we will show that improvement in fine-tuned classification performance continues smoothly even as the generative loss approaches the irreducible loss. This result strongly suggests that representation quality continues to improve smoothly even when the generative loss trend appears to taper off.
items.zh: 此外，我们将展示，即使生成损失接近不可约损失，微调分类性能的改进仍会平滑地继续。这一结果强烈表明，即使生成损失趋势似乎趋于平缓，表示质量仍会平滑地持续改进。

full.sec: 3.1 Varying the Image Resolution and Encoding
full.secZh: 3.1 改变图像分辨率与编码

items.capEn: Figure 7: Comparison of image resolutions (model size scaling)— Top: We display scaling laws with model size for various image resolutions, and also with various VQ encodings, along with power-law plus constant fits (dashed) to equation (1.1). The fits for pixel-level image modeling are shown in table 3. Note that the tiniest (10k non-embedding parameter) pixel models underperform at higher resolutions; we suspect they have difficulty recognizing relative positions in larger images. These deficiencies are even more clearly visible in the compute trends. Bottom: We show the reducible losses, which estimate the KL divergence between the true probability distribution over images and the distribution predicted by our models. We show the result as a function of model size and image resolution or encoding, along with pure power-law trends.
items.capZh: 图7：图像分辨率的比较（模型大小缩放）——顶部：我们展示了不同图像分辨率以及不同VQ编码下模型大小的缩放定律，以及方程(1.1)的幂律加常数拟合（虚线）。像素级图像建模的拟合结果见表3。请注意，最小的（10k非嵌入参数）像素模型在较高分辨率下表现不佳；我们怀疑它们难以识别较大图像中的相对位置。这些缺陷在算力趋势中更为明显。底部：我们展示了可约损失，它估计了图像的真实概率分布与模型预测分布之间的KL散度。我们展示了作为模型大小和图像分辨率或编码函数的结果，以及纯幂律趋势。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Comparison of image resolutions (compute scaling)— We display scaling of the reducible loss with compute for pixel-level image modeling at various resolutions (first line), and for various VQ encodings of 64x64 images (second line). We show the test loss, but we did not observe any train/test gap for these models. A few models diverged late in training.
items.capZh: 图8：图像分辨率的比较（算力缩放）——我们展示了不同分辨率下像素级图像建模的可约损失随算力的缩放（第一行），以及64x64图像的各种VQ编码（第二行）。我们展示了测试损失，但未观察到这些模型的训练/测试差距。少数模型在训练后期发散。

items.en: We trained Transformers on the YFCC100m dataset after scaling images down to 8x8, 16x16, and 32x32 pixel resolutions, along with 64x64 images encoded with VQ codes [vdOVK18] with 16x16 and 32x32 VQ code patterns. We display the trends for the reducible loss per image as a function of the compute budget in figure 8 (see figure 18 in the appendix for trends for the full loss). We include these figures to emphasize that the reducible loss for an optimally-allocated compute budget follows a power-law trend, even when the reducible loss becomes very small.
items.zh: 我们在YFCC100m数据集上训练了Transformer，将图像缩放至8x8、16x16和32x32像素分辨率，以及使用VQ编码[vdOVK18]的64x64图像，采用16x16和32x32的VQ编码模式。我们在图8中展示了每张图像的可约损失随算力预算变化的趋势（完整损失趋势见附录图18）。我们包含这些图是为了强调，即使可约损失变得非常小，最优分配算力预算下的可约损失也遵循幂律趋势。

items.en: Note that the smallest models underperform as compared to the trends at resolutions greater than 8x8. We see this both for the compute trends in figure 8 as well as in model-size trends in figure 7. We speculate that this is due to difficulty utilizing the positional encodings. For example, our smallest models have only 10k non-embedding parameters, while 32x32 images include 307230723072 tokens in their context, each with a distinct positional embedding.
items.zh: 请注意，在分辨率大于8x8时，最小的模型表现低于趋势。我们在图8的算力趋势和图7的模型大小趋势中都看到了这一点。我们推测这是由于难以利用位置编码。例如，我们最小的模型只有10k非嵌入参数，而32x32图像在其上下文中包含3072个词元，每个词元都有一个独特的位置嵌入。

items.en: To understand the significance of the reducible loss trends in table 3, recall that the cross entropy loss between the true distribution P𝑃P and the model distribution Q𝑄Q is
items.zh: 为了理解表3中可约损失趋势的意义，回想一下真实分布P和模型分布Q之间的交叉熵损失为

items.en: The KL divergence vanishes when P=Q𝑃𝑄P=Q, and is otherwise strictly non-negative. Thus we can identify the irreducible loss with S​(P)𝑆𝑃S(P), the constant entropy of the true distribution. Then the reducible loss estimates the KL divergence between the true distribution and the distribution predicted by the model. This interpretation can only make sense if in the limit of infinite data and compute, we expect the transformer to perfectly model the data distribution. We have focused on L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) trends because the asymptotic limits of the model size trend L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) could be misleading if the models have not all been trained fully to convergence.
items.zh: 当P=Q时，KL散度为零，否则严格非负。因此，我们可以将不可约损失识别为S(P)，即真实分布的常数熵。那么可约损失估计了真实分布与模型预测分布之间的KL散度。这种解释只有在数据无限且算力无限的极限下，我们期望Transformer完美建模数据分布时才有意义。我们关注L(C)趋势，因为模型大小趋势L(N)的渐近极限可能具有误导性，如果模型没有全部训练到完全收敛。

items.en: The power-law trends in DKLsubscript𝐷KLD_{\mathrm{KL}} can be extrapolated down to the level of just a few nats per image. Models powerful enough to reach this level of performance model the distribution of images with near-perfect fidelity. In fact we see that models with ∼1similar-toabsent1\sim 1B parameters nearly achieve this feat for 8x8 ‘images’. However, we see that for larger images we would need enormous quantities of compute to perfectly model the true image distribution.
items.zh: DKL中的幂律趋势可以外推到每张图像仅几个nats的水平。足够强大的模型达到这一性能水平时，能够以近乎完美的保真度对图像分布进行建模。事实上，我们看到参数约10亿的模型几乎在8x8的“图像”上实现了这一壮举。然而，我们看到对于更大的图像，我们需要巨大的算力才能完美建模真实的图像分布。

items.en: The consistency of the trends among distinct image resolutions in figure 7 and the strikingly small reducible loss for the 8x8 case suggests that if we could run much larger models, we would continue to see smooth improvements at higher resolution. It seems that compute requirements for a near-perfect model of the data distribution grow as a steep power-law or even an exponential in the image resolution. Of course we do not expect to need a perfect model of the probability distribution of real-world images for practical tasks.
items.zh: 图7中不同图像分辨率之间趋势的一致性以及8x8情况下极小的可约损失表明，如果我们能运行更大的模型，我们将在更高分辨率下继续看到平滑的改进。似乎对数据分布进行近乎完美建模所需的算力随着图像分辨率呈陡峭的幂律甚至指数增长。当然，我们并不期望在实际任务中需要真实世界图像概率分布的完美模型。

full.secZh: 3.2 视频建模与单帧处理

items.en: For the case of video modeling, it is natural to extend the overall trends to the study of specific frames. We display several frame-dependent results in figure 9. On the left we show loss as a function of model size, omitting the first frame, which has a much larger loss and should be considered an image modeling problem. In the center we show compute scaling of the reducible loss on the final frame. On the right in the same figure we show the reducible loss for the final (16th) frame, which is of particular interest when generating a continuation of an existing video. Much like the trends for image modeling, we see that the reducible loss is very well approximated by a power-law, making it possible to forecast that we would need a model size around ∼1013similar-toabsentsuperscript1013\sim 10^{13} parameters and compute of around 104superscript10410^{4} PF-days to achieve a loss of just a few nats/frame on the final frame of this type of video.
items.zh: 对于视频建模的情况，很自然地将整体趋势扩展到特定帧的研究。我们在图9中展示了几个与帧相关的结果。左侧我们展示了损失作为模型大小的函数，省略了第一帧，其损失大得多，应被视为图像建模问题。中间我们展示了最后一帧可约损失的算力缩放。右侧在同一图中我们展示了最后一帧（第16帧）的可约损失，这在生成现有视频的延续时特别有意义。与图像建模的趋势非常相似，我们看到可约损失很好地近似为幂律，从而可以预测，我们需要大约10^13参数的模型大小和大约10^4 PF-days的算力，才能在这类视频的最后一帧上实现仅几个nats/帧的损失。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Per-frame video performance trends — On the left we show scaling trends for specific frames in 16-frame videos. In the center we show the reducible loss as a function of compute for the final frame of the video. On the right we show the reducible loss and its pure power-law trend with model size for the final frame in a video.
items.capZh: 图9：每帧视频性能趋势——左侧我们展示了16帧视频中特定帧的缩放趋势。中间我们展示了视频最后一帧可约损失随算力的变化。右侧我们展示了最后一帧的可约损失及其随模型大小的纯幂律趋势。

full.secZh: 3.3 单张图像的缩放趋势

items.en: We have observed very consistent scaling trends on a variety of data modalities. This raises a question – does the loss achieved by different sized models on specific, individual data examples scale in the same way? Or are the distribution-level trends an aggregate of many different trends on individual examples?
items.zh: 我们在多种数据模态上观察到了非常一致的缩放趋势。这引发了一个问题——不同大小模型在特定、单个数据样本上实现的损失是否以相同的方式缩放？还是分布层面的趋势是许多单个样本上不同趋势的聚合？

items.en: To answer these questions, we evaluated the loss of all the pixel-level 32x32 image models on a thousand randomly chosen images from the test set. When plotting the loss as a function of model size for individual, randomly chosen examples, in essentially all cases we observe a smooth, power-law plus constant trend.
items.zh: 为了回答这些问题，我们评估了所有像素级32x32图像模型在从测试集中随机选择的一千张图像上的损失。当绘制单个随机选择样本的损失随模型大小的变化时，在几乎所有情况下我们都观察到平滑的幂律加常数趋势。

items.en: To convey this information, for each model size we evaluate the 1,5,20,50,80,95, and 99 percentile of the loss among a thousand images in the distribution, for each model size. We then plot the trends in these percentile losses in figure 10. We see very similar trends among all percentiles of the loss distribution, and all are well-described by equation (1.1). We show model size trends for eight randomly chosen individual test images in figure 17. We also display the most and least improved 10 images from a sample of one thousand test images in figure 20. Finally, we visualize the trends in a different way, by generating conditional samples at each model size, in figure 21.
items.zh: 为了传达这一信息，对于每个模型大小，我们评估了分布中一千张图像损失的第1、5、20、50、80、95和99百分位数。然后我们在图10中绘制这些百分位数损失的趋势。我们看到损失分布的所有百分位数之间趋势非常相似，并且都很好地由方程(1.1)描述。我们在图17中展示了八个随机选择的单个测试图像的模型大小趋势。我们还在图20中展示了从一千张测试图像样本中改进最大和最小的10张图像。最后，我们通过在图21中生成每个模型大小的条件样本来以不同方式可视化这些趋势。

items.en: We would expect that these findings also apply to other data modalities. On a quick inspection, we found the same patterns for randomly chosen text sequences and language models of different sizes.
items.zh: 我们预计这些发现也适用于其他数据模态。经过快速检查，我们发现在随机选择的文本序列和不同大小的语言模型中也存在相同的模式。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Performance trends for image dataset percentiles— We selected one thousand images from the 32x32 image test set, and evaluated the loss of all models on each image. In this figure we plot the trends in the 1, 5, 20, 50, 80, 95, 99 percentiles of the loss distribution over these images, along with power-law plus constant fits (dashed). We also observe similar trends for randomly chosen individual images (figure 17).
items.capZh: 图10：图像数据集百分位数的性能趋势——我们从32x32图像测试集中选取了一千张图像，并评估了所有模型在每张图像上的损失。此图绘制了这些图像损失分布的1、5、20、50、80、95、99百分位数的趋势，以及幂律加常数拟合（虚线）。我们还观察到随机选择的单个图像有类似趋势（图17）。

full.secZh: 3.4 在32x32分辨率下对ImageNet进行微调

items.en: By finetuning generative models for image classification we gain another handle on the scaling of performance with model size. We use the scaled-down 32x32 resolution ImageNet [CLH17] and finetune the 32x32 resolution pixel-level generative image models.
items.zh: 通过微调生成模型进行图像分类，我们获得了另一种衡量性能随模型规模扩展的方式。我们使用缩小版的32x32分辨率ImageNet [CLH17]，并微调32x32分辨率的像素级生成图像模型。

items.en: To turn these models into classifiers, we remove their final embedding matrix and use the mean-pooled (over all pixels) activations of the transformer’s final layer as the input to a new single-layer classifier. During finetuning we backpropagate through the full transformer, and we do not freeze any of its weights. As a comparison, we also train equivalent randomly initialized transformer models ‘from scratch’ on only the classification task.
items.zh: 为了将这些模型转化为分类器，我们移除其最终的嵌入矩阵，并使用Transformer最后一层的平均池化（在所有像素上）激活作为新单层分类器的输入。在微调过程中，我们通过整个Transformer反向传播，并且不冻结任何权重。作为对比，我们还仅在分类任务上从头训练了等效的随机初始化Transformer模型。

items.en: Finetuning learning curves for both pretrained and randomly initialized models are available in figure 11. In all cases we use a batch size of 102410241024 images, and we use the same learning rate schedule for finetuning as was used for pretraining. We see that for small models, pretraining affords almost no benefit compared to training from scratch, but it greatly enhances the performance of larger models.
items.zh: 预训练和随机初始化模型的微调学习曲线见图11。在所有情况下，我们使用1024张图像的批量大小，并采用与预训练相同的学习率调度进行微调。我们发现，对于小模型，预训练相比从头训练几乎没有优势，但它极大地提升了较大模型的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Trends in image classification performance— Top: We show model size scaling results for 32x32 pixel ImageNet [CLH17] classification. We compare models trained from scratch on ImageNet classification (ie with no pre-training) to finetuned generative models. Though the generative loss trend bends as it approaches the irreducible loss (figure 7), the pretrained models exhibit a straight power-law trend in classification performance vs model size, which also continues far beyond the point where the models that were trained from scratch exhibit overfitting. Bottom: Larger pre-trained models fine-tune significantly faster, and to significantly better performance, despite the approach to the irreducible generative loss. The same does not hold when training from scratch.
items.capZh: 图11：图像分类性能趋势——顶部：我们展示了32x32像素ImageNet [CLH17]分类的模型规模缩放结果。我们比较了在ImageNet分类上从头训练的模型（即无预训练）与微调后的生成模型。尽管生成损失在接近不可约损失时趋势弯曲（图7），但预训练模型在分类性能与模型规模之间呈现出直线幂律趋势，并且该趋势远远超过了从头训练模型出现过拟合的点。底部：较大的预训练模型微调速度显著更快，性能也显著更好，尽管接近不可约生成损失。从头训练时则不然。

items.en: More importantly, in figure 11 we show the model-size trends of ImageNet classification performance for pretrained and randomly initialized models. We see that the pre-trained models follow a smooth, pure power-law777We have not encountered a clear irreducible loss in the range of model sizes that we have explored. trend in both loss as well as error rate (1−limit-from11- accuracy). The very existence of these trends on a downstream finetuning task provides a striking confirmation of the importance of neural scaling laws for AI capabilities. In the case of language, GPT-3 [BMR+20] provides many more examples.
items.zh: 更重要的是，在图11中，我们展示了预训练和随机初始化模型在ImageNet分类性能上的模型规模趋势。我们看到预训练模型在损失和错误率（1−准确率）上都遵循平滑的纯幂律趋势。这些趋势在下游微调任务上的存在，有力地证实了神经缩放定律对AI能力的重要性。在语言方面，GPT-3 [BMR+20]提供了更多例子。

items.en: We also emphasize that the proximity to the irreducible loss does not necessarily indicate diminishing returns with regards to model performance. The trends in figure 11 continue smoothly, even though the green curve corresponding to 32x32 resolution in figure 7 suggests a close approach to the irreducible loss for models with >107absentsuperscript107>10^{7} parameters. Apparently, a great deal of important semantic information lies in the ‘last few bits’ near the irreducible loss. We may also interpret this as the pre-training process providing a highly effective regularizer for downstream tasks.
items.zh: 我们还强调，接近不可约损失并不一定意味着模型性能的收益递减。图11中的趋势平滑地持续，尽管图7中对应32x32分辨率的绿色曲线表明，对于参数>10^7的模型，已接近不可约损失。显然，大量重要的语义信息位于不可约损失附近的“最后几个比特”中。我们也可以将这一现象解释为预训练过程为下游任务提供了高度有效的正则化。

full.secZh: 4 多模态模型与信息增益

items.en: Is a picture worth a thousand words? With multimodal models we can study the amount of information that one domain provides about another. For this purpose we study the empirical mutual information between images and text and the infogain defined in equation (1.3). The latter has the interesting property that it must lie in the interval [0,1]01[0,1], with larger values suggestive of better performing multimodal models.
items.zh: 一幅图胜过千言万语吗？通过多模态模型，我们可以研究一个领域提供关于另一个领域的信息量。为此，我们研究了图像与文本之间的经验互信息以及公式(1.3)定义的信息增益。后者具有一个有趣的性质：它必须位于区间[0,1]内，较大的值表明多模态模型性能更好。

items.en: To estimate the empirical mutual information between the image and text for text-to-image models, we subtract the captioned-image loss from the image loss in the presence of a blank caption. Similarly, we subtract text losses with and without corresponding images for image-to-text models.
items.zh: 为了估计文本到图像模型中图像与文本之间的经验互信息，我们从有空白标题的图像损失中减去有标题的图像损失。类似地，对于图像到文本模型，我们减去有和没有对应图像时的文本损失。

items.en: However, these measurements have a potentially serious flaw – if the models have only been trained on multimodal data, then blank captions and blank images may be out of distribution. We minimize this issue by measuring the mutual information only after finetuning our models for 104superscript10410^{4} steps on an even mixture of data with and without captions (for text-to-image) or with and without images (for image-to-text). Empirically we find that without this finetuning, the mutual information is measured to be about twice as large. In the case of text-to-image models, we also tried training from scratch on a 95/5 mixture of mulitmodal and blank caption data, and found very similar results. The learning curves for the mutual information and some other comparisons can be found in appendix C.
items.zh: 然而，这些测量存在一个潜在严重缺陷——如果模型仅在多模态数据上训练，那么空白标题和空白图像可能分布外。我们通过仅在微调模型10^4步（使用有标题和无标题数据的均匀混合，对于文本到图像；或使用有图像和无图像数据的均匀混合，对于图像到文本）后测量互信息来最小化这一问题。经验上，我们发现如果没有这种微调，测得的互信息大约会大一倍。对于文本到图像模型，我们还尝试了从95/5的多模态和空白标题数据混合从头训练，并发现了非常相似的结果。互信息的学习曲线和其他一些比较见附录C。

items.en: We plot the mutual information and the infogain ratio in figure 12. We see that billion-parameter, decoder-only transformer models extract about 8 nats of information concerning the image from an average text caption in the test set. In the case of both Image-to-Text and Text-to-Image multimodal models, we observe empirically that mutual information and infogain varies with model size as
items.zh: 我们在图12中绘制了互信息和信息增益比。我们看到，十亿参数、仅解码器的Transformer模型从测试集中的平均文本标题中提取出约8纳特的图像信息。在图像到文本和文本到图像多模态模型的情况下，我们经验观察到互信息和信息增益随模型规模变化为

items.en: with different λ𝜆\lambda and Ncsubscript𝑁𝑐N_{c} for the two cases. We can derive this approximate formula from plausible assumptions, as discussed in appendix E. If this trend holds over a large range of N𝑁N, it might be used in combination with the upper bound infogain <1absent1<1 to roughly estimate the maximal productive model size.
items.zh: 其中两种情况的λ和N_c不同。我们可以从合理的假设推导出这个近似公式，如附录E所述。如果这个趋势在较大的N范围内成立，它可能结合上界信息增益<1来粗略估计最大有效模型规模。

items.en: However, the trends identified in figure 12 suggest a very slow growth of infogain with N𝑁N for these models, so it seems unrealistic to extrapolate all the way to an infogain =1absent1=1. Furthermore, in the data distribution the text and images are not always closely correlated, as in many examples much of the text has little to do with the accompanying image. So instead we might ask when 20%percent2020\% of the information in the text will be used to define the image, doubling the infogain of a 1B parameter model. For text-to-image models, this threshold will be met with models of size N≈3𝑁3N\approx 3 trillion parameters, though for image-to-text models this remains far out of reach. Other architectures may improve on these results, but we conjecture that they will display similar trends with model size.
items.zh: 然而，图12中识别的趋势表明这些模型的信息增益随N增长非常缓慢，因此外推至信息增益=1似乎不现实。此外，在数据分布中，文本和图像并不总是紧密相关，因为许多例子中文本与伴随的图像关系不大。因此，我们可能转而问何时文本中20%的信息将用于定义图像，使1B参数模型的信息增益翻倍。对于文本到图像模型，这一阈值将在模型规模N≈3万亿参数时达到，但对于图像到文本模型，这仍然遥不可及。其他架构可能改进这些结果，但我们推测它们将显示出类似的随模型规模变化的趋势。

items.en: Text-to-image models have much larger mutual information and infogain, as compared to image-to-text models. We speculate that this is due to the fact that much more processing is required to extract semantic information from images than from text.
items.zh: 与图像到文本模型相比，文本到图像模型具有更大的互信息和信息增益。我们推测这是因为从图像中提取语义信息需要比从文本中多得多的处理。

items.en: We can now revisit the question of how many words a picture is worth. Figure 3 shows the loss per text token, including padding tokens; if we exclude padding tokens, the largest image-to-text models achieve a loss of 2.6 nats per text token, or about 3.4 nats per word. Comparing the image-to-text mutual information of 8 nats, we find that a 32x32 image is worth only about 2-3 words to our best models.
items.zh: 我们现在可以重新审视一幅图值多少个词的问题。图3显示了每个文本标记的损失，包括填充标记；如果排除填充标记，最大的图像到文本模型达到每个文本标记2.6纳特的损失，或每个词约3.4纳特。比较图像到文本的8纳特互信息，我们发现对于我们的最佳模型，一幅32x32图像仅值约2-3个词。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Mutual information trends for multimodal models— We show the empirical mutual information between image and text in multimodal models (left) and the Infogain (right), which is the ratio of the empirical mutual information to the empirical entropy of the text. The results in these plots were compiled after finetuning multimodal models for 10k steps on half multimodal, half blanked caption/image data, to ensure that blank captions/images were not out of distribution. The largest text-to-image models use about 10% of the information in the text when constructing images.
items.capZh: 图12：多模态模型的互信息趋势——我们展示了多模态模型中图像与文本之间的经验互信息（左）和信息增益（右），信息增益是经验互信息与文本经验熵的比值。这些图中的结果是在多模态模型微调10k步（使用一半多模态、一半空白标题/图像数据）后编译的，以确保空白标题/图像不是分布外。最大的文本到图像模型在构建图像时使用了约10%的文本信息。

full.secZh: 5 数学问题求解与外推

items.en: In the context of machine learning, generalization most often refers to the gap between test and training performance. But on a conceptual level, generalization can also refer to the more ambitious possibility of extrapolation from the training distribution to a larger or more diverse distribution. Mathematical problem solving lends itself very naturally to the study of extrapolation, because we can extend the range of numbers or operations used to create math problems, or the recursive/compositional depth [HDMB19] required for a solution.
items.zh: 在机器学习中，泛化通常指测试与训练性能之间的差距。但在概念层面上，泛化也可以指从训练分布外推到更大或更多样化分布的更雄心勃勃的可能性。数学问题求解非常适合研究外推，因为我们可以扩展用于创建数学问题的数字或操作范围，或解决方案所需的递归/组合深度 [HDMB19]。

items.en: We studied this phenomenon in the fundamental figure 3, where we evaluate problem solving performance using a variety of test sets indexed by a numerical level, which corresponds to an ‘entropy’ used for generation [SGHK19]. We observe fairly smooth power-law plus constant trends for the loss on all of these test sets, but with different exponents and offsets depending on the difficulty level. So extrapolation performance improves with model size.
items.zh: 我们在基础图3中研究了这一现象，其中我们使用由数值级别索引的各种测试集评估问题求解性能，该级别对应于用于生成的“熵” [SGHK19]。我们观察到所有测试集上的损失都有相当平滑的幂律加常数趋势，但根据难度级别有不同的指数和偏移。因此，外推性能随模型规模提高。

items.en: However, as we show in figure 13, the extrapolative capabilities of these models predominantly depends on the models’ performance on the training distribution. That is, models of different sizes that achieve the same loss on the training distribution perform about equally on the various test distributions. In this sense, increasing the model size does not automatically improve extrapolation, except insofar as it improves performance on the training distribution. Similar results were found in [KMH+20] when extrapolating from one text distribution to another.
items.zh: 然而，如图13所示，这些模型的外推能力主要取决于模型在训练分布上的性能。也就是说，在训练分布上达到相同损失的不同规模模型在各种测试分布上表现大致相同。从这个意义上说，增加模型规模并不会自动改善外推，除非它改善了训练分布上的性能。在[KMH+20]中从一种文本分布外推到另一种时也发现了类似结果。

items.en: Finally, for completeness we note that the information theoretic interpretation of the loss has a somewhat different meaning in the context of math problem solving, where the answers are deterministically related to the questions, so that the entropy should truly vanish. For much more detailed results on math performance and a great many more trends see appendix B.
items.zh: 最后，为完整起见，我们注意到损失的信息论解释在数学问题求解的背景下具有不同的含义，其中答案与问题确定性相关，因此熵应真正为零。关于数学性能的更详细结果和更多趋势见附录B。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Mathematics difficulty levels— We show the loss (left) and accuracy (right) during training, as a function of the training loss, for math problems at various difficulty levels. We emphasize that models of different size perform nearly identically when we hold the training loss fixed. Thus in the case of math problem solving, both interpolation and extrapolation performance depends on model size primarily through the training loss. Note the difficulties ≤10absent10\leq 10 are within the training distribution; for levels >10absent10>10 we expect non-zero test loss even as the training loss tends to zero.
items.capZh: 图13：数学难度等级——我们展示了训练过程中，针对不同难度等级的数学问题，损失（左）和准确率（右）随训练损失的变化。我们强调，当训练损失固定时，不同大小的模型表现几乎相同。因此，在数学问题求解中，插值和外推性能主要通过训练损失依赖于模型大小。注意，难度≤10的题目在训练分布内；对于>10的等级，即使训练损失趋于零，我们预计测试损失也不为零。

full.sec: 6 An Inconsistency in Compute and Datasize Scaling Laws
full.secZh: 6 计算量与数据量缩放定律中的不一致性

items.capEn: Figure 14: Training speed approaches a limit— Left: These figures show learning curves for various model sizes, along with the trend for fully trained, early-stopped L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D), identifying the dataset size in tokens with the number of elapsed tokens during training. We observe that the learning curves are approaching L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) as model size increases. Right: We show learning curves along with the L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) trend in black. On the same plot we show L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) vs C​(D)𝐶𝐷C(D) in blue, where the latter is determined by identifying the optimal proportion of compute to allocate to tokens, and then assuming this corresponds to one epoch of training. By construction all learning curves must lie above and to the right of the blue dashed line, so the intersection of the black and blue lines suggests a breakdown of some trend. The red shaded region corresponds to altering the optimal model size exponent by ±5plus-or-minus5\pm 5%, illustrating that projections are extremely sensitive to these trends.
items.capZh: 图14：训练速度趋近于极限——左图：展示了不同模型大小的学习曲线，以及完全训练、早停的L(D)趋势，其中数据集大小（以token计）与训练过程中消耗的token数对应。我们观察到，随着模型大小增加，学习曲线趋近于L(D)。右图：展示了学习曲线以及L(C)趋势（黑色）。在同一图中，我们以蓝色显示了L(D)与C(D)的关系，其中C(D)通过确定分配给token的最优算力比例并假设这对应一个训练周期得到。根据构造，所有学习曲线必须位于蓝色虚线的右上方，因此黑线和蓝线的交点表明某些趋势的失效。红色阴影区域对应最优模型大小指数变化±5%，说明预测对这些趋势极其敏感。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Training speed approaches a limit (language)— Here we show an approximation of L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) with 2% estimated errors, and the language modeling learning curves from [BMR+20]. The L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) trend comes from [KMH+20], but the models in that work were trained on a slightly different data distribution and with half the context length of [BMR+20].
items.capZh: 图15：训练速度趋近于极限（语言）——这里我们展示了L(D)的近似（估计误差2%），以及来自[BMR+20]的语言建模学习曲线。L(D)趋势来自[KMH+20]，但该工作中的模型在略有不同的数据分布上训练，且上下文长度仅为[BMR+20]的一半。

items.en: An inconsistency among the datasize and compute scaling laws was observed in [KMH+20]. In this section we will study the same phenomenon using image models on low resolution images, though we expect the results will be qualitatively the same on any of the datasets we have covered.
items.zh: 在[KMH+20]中观察到数据大小和算力缩放定律之间存在不一致。本节我们将使用低分辨率图像上的图像模型研究相同现象，尽管我们预计结果在我们涵盖的任何数据集上定性相同。

items.en: Before discussing the inconsistency, consider the plots on the left of figure 14. We show both learning curves and the trend L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) for trained models, identifying the dataset size with the number of tokens seen by various models during training. The learning curves lie above the L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) trend because the optimization process fails to achieve the minimum loss in a single epoch. If the optimizer were perfect (in a sense), then L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) would coincide with the learning curve, assuming performance is not limited by model size. Note that as model size increases, the learning curves appear to approach ever closer to the L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) trend. This means that larger models learn faster, and it also implies that optimization becomes increasingly effective as model size increases. But learning curves will always be bounded by L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D), which sets the sample efficiency. We show the same phenomena for language in figure 15, though we can only estimate888We need to account for slightly different data distributions, and context lengths differing by a factor of 2. We estimate that these produce errors less than about 2% of the loss, which we show as a shaded region on the plot. L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) for these models.
items.zh: 在讨论不一致之前，先考虑图14左侧的图。我们展示了学习曲线和已训练模型的L(D)趋势，其中数据集大小与训练期间各种模型看到的token数对应。学习曲线位于L(D)趋势之上，因为优化过程未能在单个周期内达到最小损失。如果优化器是完美的（在某种意义上），那么L(D)将与学习曲线重合，假设性能不受模型大小限制。注意，随着模型大小增加，学习曲线似乎越来越接近L(D)趋势。这意味着更大的模型学习更快，也表明随着模型大小增加，优化变得越来越有效。但学习曲线始终受L(D)约束，后者决定了样本效率。我们在图15中展示了语言的相同现象，尽管我们只能估计⁸这些模型的L(D)。

items.en: To see an apparent inconsistency, we must compare the projections from two different trends. For the L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) compute trend we can just reproduce results from figure 7. To plot L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) with compute on the x-axis, we will use the power-law trend Nopt​(C)≈(2.8×108)​C0.74subscript𝑁opt𝐶2.8superscript108superscript𝐶0.74N_{\rm opt}(C)\approx(2.8\times 10^{8})C^{0.74} for 16x16 images (see figure 16), where C𝐶C is measured in petaflop-days. From this we can solve for the optimal number of tokens processed during training using C=6​D​N𝐶6𝐷𝑁C=6DN, which leads to C​(D)≈(5×10−42)​D3.9𝐶𝐷5superscript1042superscript𝐷3.9C(D)\approx(5\times 10^{-42})D^{3.9} where D𝐷D is measured in tokens. A similar analysis applies to 8x8 images. Using these results we can plot L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) vs C​(D)𝐶𝐷C(D) parametrically, as shown on the right of figure 14 for the reducible999For these figures we subtract the irreducible loss measured from each of L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) and L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C), respectively, since numerically the irreducible losses from these two measurements are not exactly equal. loss (chosen for clarity on the log plot). We have also included a shaded region showing the effect of changing the empirically extracted Nopt​(C)subscript𝑁opt𝐶N_{\rm opt}(C) trend exponent by ±5plus-or-minus5\pm 5%.
items.zh: 为了看到明显的不一致，我们必须比较两个不同趋势的预测。对于L(C)算力趋势，我们可以直接重现图7的结果。为了在x轴上绘制L(D)与算力的关系，我们将使用16x16图像的幂律趋势N_opt(C)≈(2.8×10^8)C^0.74（见图16），其中C以petaflop-day为单位。由此我们可以使用C=6DN求解训练期间处理的最优token数，得到C(D)≈(5×10^{-42})D^3.9，其中D以token为单位。类似的分析适用于8x8图像。利用这些结果，我们可以参数化地绘制L(D)与C(D)的关系，如图14右侧所示，针对可约损失⁹（为在对数图上清晰起见选择）。我们还包含了一个阴影区域，显示经验提取的N_opt(C)趋势指数变化±5%的效果。

items.en: The inconsistency arises because all learning curves must lie above the L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) trend on the right of figure 14, but the extrapolation of L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) eventually intersects and passes below L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D). Either L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D), L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C), or the Nopt​(C)subscript𝑁opt𝐶N_{\rm opt}(C) trend must break down at or before this intersection point. Note that the existence of this intersection is an inevitable consequence of the power-law form of the trends, since these lead to straight lines on a log-plot, and two straight lines must intersect.
items.zh: 不一致的出现是因为所有学习曲线必须位于图14右侧L(D)趋势之上，但L(C)的外推最终与L(D)相交并低于L(D)。要么L(D)、L(C)或N_opt(C)趋势必须在此交点或之前失效。注意，这种交点的存在是趋势幂律形式的必然结果，因为幂律在对数图上产生直线，而两条直线必然相交。

items.en: We do not know for certain how this inconsistency or its equivalent for language [KMH+20] are resolved. However, the observation of the left of figure 14 and our earlier discussion suggests a plausible hypothesis. As we increase model and dataset sizes, optimization becomes increasingly efficient, until eventually learning curves begin to merge with the L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) trend, so that there are no benefits to be gained from training for more than a single epoch [Kom19]. Near the intersection point, the compute frontier would bend and become coincident with L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D). From this point of view, the fact that L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) appears steeper than L​(D​(C))𝐿𝐷𝐶L(D(C)) is due to a deficiency with optimization, which requires more than one epoch to reach a local minimum of the test loss. It would be interesting to investigate this hypothesis in the future. If it is true, it suggests that the relative scaling of optimal model and dataset sizes may eventually change, and perhaps will ultimately be set by trends for overfitting such as those found in [RRBS19, KMH+20].
items.zh: 我们不确定这种不一致或其语言等价形式[KMH+20]如何解决。然而，图14左侧的观察和我们之前的讨论提出了一个合理的假设。随着模型和数据集大小的增加，优化变得越来越高效，直到最终学习曲线开始与L(D)趋势合并，因此训练超过一个周期没有好处[Kom19]。在交点附近，算力前沿将弯曲并与L(D)重合。从这个角度看，L(C)比L(D(C))更陡是由于优化的缺陷，需要多个周期才能达到测试损失的局部最小值。未来研究这一假设将很有趣。如果成立，它表明最优模型和数据集大小的相对缩放最终可能改变，并可能由过拟合趋势（如[RRBS19, KMH+20]中的发现）决定。

items.en: Finally, we note that the irreducible loss from dataset size trend is measured at L​(D=∞)≈2013𝐿𝐷2013L(D=\infty)\approx 2013 nats/image (16x16), and 599 nats/image (8x8), while that extracted from compute trends is L​(C=∞)≈2023𝐿𝐶2023L(C=\infty)\approx 2023 nats/image (16x16), and 602 nats/image (8x8). These estimates for the entropy of low-resolution YFCC100M images are quite similar, and provide a consistency check on our results.
items.zh: 最后，我们注意到数据集大小趋势的不可约损失测量为L(D=∞)≈2013 nats/image（16x16）和599 nats/image（8x8），而从算力趋势提取的为L(C=∞)≈2023 nats/image（16x16）和602 nats/image（8x8）。这些对低分辨率YFCC100M图像熵的估计非常相似，为我们的结果提供了一致性检验。

full.secZh: 7 相关工作

items.en: Predictable scaling trends for modern neural networks have been studied by a variety of groups, beginning with [HNA+17]. More recently [RRBS19, LWS+20, RDG+20, Kom19, RFCS20] studied scaling relations using many model architectures and datasets, with the work on language modeling in [KMH+20] closest to our approach here. Work on the 175B parameter GPT-3 model [BMR+20] was partially motivated by neural scaling laws.
