items.zh: 现代神经网络的可预测缩放趋势已被多个团队研究，始于[HNA+17]。最近[RRBS19, LWS+20, RDG+20, Kom19, RFCS20]使用多种模型架构和数据集研究了缩放关系，其中[KMH+20]的语言建模工作与我们的方法最接近。175B参数GPT-3模型[BMR+20]的工作部分受到神经缩放定律的启发。

items.en: There has not been a great deal of work on theoretical explanations for the very precise scaling relations we and others have identified. A simple theory connecting scaling exponents to the inverse of the dimension of the data manifold was proposed in [SK20]. Expansions in the model size, particularly at large width [LXS+19, JGH18] may provide another useful framework for thinking about some of our scaling relations, if they are in fact applicable [LBD+20] to optimally tuned hyperparameter settings.
items.zh: 关于我们和其他人发现的非常精确的缩放关系的理论解释，目前工作不多。[SK20]提出了一个简单理论，将缩放指数与数据流形维数的倒数联系起来。模型大小的展开，特别是在大宽度下[LXS+19, JGH18]，可能为思考我们的一些缩放关系提供另一个有用的框架，如果它们实际上适用于最优调优的超参数设置[LBD+20]。

items.en: The models and data modalities we used have been widely studied in the past. Autoregressive image models have been trained starting with PixelRNN [vdOKK16], with the recent work [CRC+20] nearly identical to our models and training procedure. Transformer-based video models were trained in [WTU19] and multimodal models in [TBL+19]. The original authors trained various models, including transformers, on the math problem dataset [SGHK19], and it has also been studied with more specialized architectures [SSF+19]. Our models are typically simpler than many of those that have been previously discussed, as we exclusively use decoder-only [LSP+18] transformers with dense or sparse [CGRS19] attention.
items.zh: 我们使用的模型和数据模态在过去已被广泛研究。自回归图像模型从PixelRNN[vdOKK16]开始训练，最近的工作[CRC+20]与我们的模型和训练过程几乎相同。基于Transformer的视频模型在[WTU19]中训练，多模态模型在[TBL+19]中训练。原始作者在数学问题数据集[SGHK19]上训练了包括Transformer在内的各种模型，该数据集也已被更专门的架构研究[SSF+19]。我们的模型通常比之前讨论的许多模型更简单，因为我们专门使用仅解码器[LSP+18]的Transformer，具有密集或稀疏[CGRS19]注意力机制。

full.secZh: 8 讨论

items.en: We have argued that a single neural architecture, the Transformer, can be applied to the generative modeling of images, videos, multimodal data, and math, along with language [KMH+20, BMR+20]. We identified common scaling laws for the loss achieved on all data modalities as a function of both model size and compute budget. As in the case of language, these results imply that larger models become more sample efficient. Furthermore, we found that in some important cases, finetuned performance on downstream tasks also follows similar scaling laws. This suggests that trends in the generative modeling loss translate into advantages in practical capabilities.
items.zh: 我们认为，单一神经架构Transformer可以应用于图像、视频、多模态数据和数学的生成建模，以及语言[KMH+20, BMR+20]。我们识别了所有数据模态上损失随模型大小和算力预算变化的共同缩放定律。与语言情况一样，这些结果表明更大的模型变得更具样本效率。此外，我们发现，在一些重要情况下，下游任务的微调性能也遵循类似的缩放定律。这表明生成建模损失的趋势转化为实际能力的优势。

items.en: A greater surprise was the approximately universal trend (figure 2) for optimal model size as a function of the training compute budget – we did not anticipate that the exponent Nopt∝C0.7proportional-tosubscript𝑁optsuperscript𝐶0.7N_{\rm opt}\propto C^{0.7} would be largely independent of the data distribution. This trend implies a dual trend for the number of tokens elapsed during optimized training, as a function of C𝐶C or N𝑁N, and leads to the conclusion that larger compute budgets should be ‘spent’ mostly on larger models, rather than much longer training runs. So this lesson from language modeling [KMH+20] generalizes. These empirical regularities beg for theoretical explanation – why do these scaling relations hold?
items.zh: 一个更大的惊喜是，最优模型大小作为训练算力预算的函数近似普遍的趋势（图2）——我们没有预料到指数N_opt∝C^0.7在很大程度上独立于数据分布。这一趋势意味着优化训练期间消耗的token数作为C或N的函数存在双重趋势，并得出结论：更大的算力预算应主要“花费”在更大的模型上，而不是更长的训练运行。因此，语言建模的这一教训[KMH+20]具有普遍性。这些经验规律亟需理论解释——为什么这些缩放关系成立？

items.en: The scaling laws also suggest a shift in perspective away from the particularities of neural architectures, loss functions, and training algorithms and towards the broader commonalities that appear when machine learning is studied across a large hierarchy of model, data, and compute scales. Work in ML often involves identifying specific deficiencies in current capabilities and remedying them through the alteration of models and algorithms. Perhaps many capabilities simply lie on a spectrum that can be continuously unlocked with increasing scale, as might be suggested by the metalearning capabilities of the GPT-3 model [BMR+20].
items.zh: 缩放定律还建议将视角从神经架构、损失函数和训练算法的特殊性转向更广泛的共性，这些共性在跨模型、数据和算力规模的大层次研究机器学习时出现。机器学习的工作通常涉及识别当前能力的特定缺陷并通过修改模型和算法来弥补。也许许多能力只是位于一个可以通过规模增加而持续解锁的频谱上，正如GPT-3模型[BMR+20]的元学习能力所暗示的那样。

items.en: We also discussed some information theoretic implications of the scaling laws. Perhaps the most important point was that the two terms in equation (1.1) can be interpreted as the entropy of the true data distribution, and the KL divergence between that distribution and a given generative model. The identification of the entropy was made possible through the extrapolation of a precise trend, and would not be predictable using the results from a single model. We also observed intriguing scaling laws for the empirical mutual information between images and captions in multimodal models. This is particularly interesting because the mutual information must be bounded by the entropy of the caption.
items.zh: 我们还讨论了缩放定律的一些信息论含义。也许最重要的一点是，方程(1.1)中的两项可以解释为真实数据分布的熵，以及该分布与给定生成模型之间的KL散度。熵的识别是通过精确趋势的外推实现的，而使用单个模型的结果无法预测。我们还观察到多模态模型中图像和标题之间经验互信息的有趣缩放定律。这特别有趣，因为互信息必须受标题熵的约束。

items.capEn: Figure 16: Optimal model size (individual trends)— We show the optimal model size for a given compute budget, along with power-law fits, based on the points at the compute-efficient frontier of figure 5. These trends are combined in figure 2.

full.sec: Appendix A More Details on Image Modeling
full.secZh: 附录A 图像建模更多细节

items.en: In figures 18 and 19 we provide some additional information documenting compute scaling trends for images with different resolutions and encodings. In figure 20 we show images where the loss improved most or least as we pass from a 100k parameter model to a 400M parameter model. In figure 17 we also show trends for randomly selected individual images from the test set.
items.zh: 在图 18 和图 19 中，我们提供了一些额外信息，记录了不同分辨率和编码下图像的算力缩放趋势。在图 20 中，我们展示了当从 10 万参数模型过渡到 4 亿参数模型时，损失改善最多或最少的图像。在图 17 中，我们还展示了从测试集中随机选择的单个图像的趋势。

items.capEn: Figure 17: Loss trend for individual images— We show the loss trend for eight randomly chosen images from the test set. These results are fairly typical.
items.capZh: 图 17：单个图像的损失趋势——我们展示了从测试集中随机选择的八张图像的损失趋势。这些结果相当典型。

items.capEn: Figure 18: Compute trends for varied image resolution (pixel-level)— Scaling laws with compute for various image resolutions in pixels, along with power-law plus constant fits (dashed) to equation (1.1). The fits for pixel-level image modeling are shown in table 3.
items.capZh: 图 18：不同图像分辨率（像素级）的算力趋势——不同像素分辨率下图像建模的缩放定律，以及方程 (1.1) 的幂律加常数拟合（虚线）。像素级图像建模的拟合结果见表 3。

items.capEn: Figure 19: Compute trends for various image resolutions (VQVAE-encoded)— We display scaling laws with compute for 64x64 images encoded with two different VQ code resolutions, along with power-law plus constant fits (dashed) to equation (1.1). A few of these runs diverged beyond the compute frontier; in the worst case this led to a visible deviation from the model size trend in figure 7.
items.capZh: 图 19：不同图像分辨率（VQVAE 编码）的算力趋势——我们展示了使用两种不同 VQ 码分辨率编码的 64x64 图像的缩放定律，以及方程 (1.1) 的幂律加常数拟合（虚线）。其中一些运行超出了算力前沿；在最坏的情况下，这导致与图 7 中的模型大小趋势出现明显偏差。

items.capEn: Figure 20: Most and least improved images— Here we show the images where the loss improved most or least between models with 400M parameters and 100k parameters. These were the ten most or least improved images from a random sample of one thousand images in the test set, as measured by loss ratio and loss difference. Images with complex colorful scenes involving people or crowds are typically most improved, while black and white images and those dominated by a simple background tend to be the least improved.
items.capZh: 图 20：改善最多和最少的图像——这里我们展示了在 4 亿参数模型和 10 万参数模型之间损失改善最多或最少的图像。这些是从测试集中随机抽取的一千张图像中改善最多或最少的十张图像，通过损失比和损失差来衡量。包含人物或人群的复杂彩色场景图像通常改善最多，而黑白图像和以简单背景为主的图像往往改善最少。

items.capEn: Figure 21: Trends in image completion quality— Here we show conditional-completions of 32x32 pixel models of various sizes, where the leftmost column is the original image, and each of the other columns shows completions from a model with a non-embedding parameter count labeled at the top. Models are provided the top half of the image as conditional context and the bottom half is sampled with temperature 1.0. There is a clear trend of increasing photorealism with larger models.
items.capZh: 图 21：图像补全质量趋势——这里我们展示了不同大小的 32x32 像素模型的条件补全结果，其中最左列是原始图像，其他各列显示来自模型的补全结果，模型顶部标有非嵌入参数计数。模型以图像上半部分作为条件上下文，下半部分以温度 1.0 采样。随着模型增大，照片真实感明显增强。

full.secZh: B.1 程序化生成的训练数据

items.en: We generated all training data procedurally using the code provided by [SGHK19]. Problems were generated by randomly sampling modules from the training distribution, with an ‘entropy’ setting sampled uniformly from the integers s∈[3,10]𝑠310s\in[3,10]. The number of problems with entropy s𝑠s is approximately 10ssuperscript10𝑠10^{s}, meaning that easy problems with low-entropy would likely be seen by the model many, many times, while some problems with s≥9𝑠9s\geq 9 may not be seen at all. This means that the easy components of the training distribution may be memorized. Furthermore, our procedurally generated data was not deduplicated from the ‘interpolate’ test distribution [SGHK19], but it is completely disjoint from the ‘extrapolate’ test distribution.
items.zh: 我们使用 [SGHK19] 提供的代码程序化生成了所有训练数据。问题通过从训练分布中随机采样模块生成，其中“熵”设置从整数 s∈[3,10] 中均匀采样。熵为 s 的问题数量约为 10^s，这意味着低熵的简单问题可能会被模型多次看到，而一些 s≥9 的问题可能根本看不到。这意味着训练分布中的简单部分可能被记忆。此外，我们程序化生成的数据未从“插值”测试分布 [SGHK19] 中去除重复，但与“外推”测试分布完全不相交。

items.en: The official extrapolate distribution only provides one difficulty level, and it also does not include all eight module-types. So we also generated distributions of problems with smoothly increasing difficulty level by setting the entropy s=1,2,⋯​19𝑠12⋯19s=1,2,\cdots 19. For most modules we simply used the interpolate settings, though for modules where other parameters were needed we generally used the extrapolation settings. Importantly, we did not include the probability__swr_p_level_set_more_samples and probability__swr_p_sequence_more_samples generators, as we found our models always performed poorly on these problems, and quickly overfit on the loss for these generators (this can be seen in figure 23, where ‘probability’ represents the mean of these two generators).
items.zh: 官方外推分布仅提供一种难度级别，且未包含全部八种模块类型。因此，我们通过设置熵 s=1,2,⋯,19 生成了难度平滑递增的问题分布。对于大多数模块，我们仅使用插值设置；但对于需要其他参数的模块，我们通常使用外推设置。重要的是，我们未包含 probability__swr_p_level_set_more_samples 和 probability__swr_p_sequence_more_samples 生成器，因为我们发现模型在这些问题上表现始终较差，并迅速过拟合这些生成器的损失（如图 23 所示，其中 'probability' 表示这两个生成器的均值）。

items.en: Performance as a function of difficulty level and model size can be seen in figure 24. We note that performance degrades smoothly as we extrapolate away from the training distribution.
items.zh: 性能随难度级别和模型大小的变化如图 24 所示。我们注意到，随着从训练分布外推，性能平滑下降。

items.en: As an additional note, because these experiments were conducted much earlier, our dataset size scaling and aspect ratio scans use models with the fairly standard setting mmlp=4subscript𝑚mlp4m_{\rm mlp}=4 and mattn=1subscript𝑚attn1m_{\rm attn}=1, as with language and multimodal models, but different from the math models we used for compute and model size trends, where these parameters were smaller by a factor of 4, as with our image and video models. We made this change to smaller mmlp,mattnsubscript𝑚mlpsubscript𝑚attnm_{\rm mlp},m_{\rm attn} as we found it helped to improve the training stability of very deep math models.
items.zh: 另外说明，由于这些实验进行得更早，我们的数据集大小缩放和宽高比扫描使用了相当标准的设置 mmlp=4 和 mattn=1，与语言和多模态模型相同，但不同于我们用于算力和模型大小趋势的数学模型，后者的这些参数缩小了 4 倍，与我们的图像和视频模型一致。我们之所以将 mmlp, mattn 改小，是因为发现这有助于提高极深数学模型的训练稳定性。

items.en: It is also worth noting that we evaluated extrapolation performance both using the training data files provided with [SGHK19] and by sampling with procedurally generated data (leaving out the two probability modules previously discussed). For trend plots we have used the procedurally generated data, but for reporting final accuracies in figure 26 we use the ‘official’ files.
items.zh: 还值得注意的是，我们使用 [SGHK19] 提供的训练数据文件以及通过程序生成数据（排除之前讨论的两个概率模块）采样来评估外推性能。趋势图使用了程序生成的数据，但在图 26 中报告最终准确率时，我们使用了 '官方' 文件。

full.secZh: B.2 数据集规模缩放

items.en: For the math dataset we studied optimal performance as a function of dataset size D𝐷D, in the limit where N≫Dmuch-greater-than𝑁𝐷N\gg D so that performance is constrained by overfitting rather than by model size or compute budget. For each dataset size and problem distribution, we define L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D) by taking the minimum loss during training (this differs slightly from early stopping, since we may evaluate at different steps if there are several metrics, ie losses on different test distributions, as is the case for math). For these experiments we used models with nlayer=64subscript𝑛layer64n_{\rm layer}=64 and dmodel=512subscript𝑑model512d_{\rm model}=512 for all dataset sizes. We obtain power-law fits for L​(D)𝐿𝐷L(D), as shown in figure 22.
items.zh: 对于数学数据集，我们研究了在 N≫D 的极限下，性能作为数据集大小 D 的函数，此时性能受限于过拟合而非模型大小或算力预算。对于每个数据集大小和问题分布，我们通过取训练期间的最小损失来定义 L(D)（这与早停略有不同，因为如果有多个指标，即不同测试分布上的损失，如数学情况，我们可能在不同步骤进行评估）。对于这些实验，我们对所有数据集大小使用 nlayer=64 和 dmodel=512 的模型。我们得到了 L(D) 的幂律拟合，如图 22 所示。

full.secZh: B.3 额外数学结果

items.en: Here we provide several additional observations about math performance, which can be divided among different math modules and difficulty levels. In figure 23 we show performance on different modules (using the files provided in [SGHK19]), while in figure 24 we show performance as a function of difficulty level for different model sizes. We provide details of achieved accuracies on the official extrapolation and interpolation test sets in figures 26 and 27.
items.zh: 这里我们提供关于数学性能的若干额外观察，这些观察可按不同数学模块和难度级别划分。图 23 展示了不同模块上的性能（使用 [SGHK19] 提供的文件），而图 24 展示了不同模型大小下性能随难度级别的变化。我们在图 26 和 27 中提供了官方外推和插值测试集上达到的准确率详情。

items.capEn: Figure 22: Math dataset size dependence— We show learning curves and trends in early-stopped loss as a function of dataset size. For the case of mathematical problem solving, we use a model with nlayer=64subscript𝑛layer64n_{\rm layer}=64 and dmodel=512subscript𝑑model512d_{\rm model}=512 for all dataset sizes.
items.capZh: 图 22：数学数据集大小依赖性——我们展示了学习曲线和早停损失随数据集大小的变化趋势。对于数学问题求解，我们对所有数据集大小使用 nlayer=64 和 dmodel=512 的模型。

items.capEn: Figure 23: Math problem types— Here we show the performance of the math models on various modules of the math dataset, using the ‘official’ files of problems provided by [SGHK19]. The interpolate problems may have been seen by the models during training, as our training set was procedurally generated. We note that the losses on individual modules are approximate power-laws with model size on most of the interpolate modules, and on two the extrapolate modules.
items.capZh: 图 23：数学问题类型——这里我们展示了数学模型在数学数据集各模块上的性能，使用 [SGHK19] 提供的 '官方' 问题文件。插值问题可能在训练期间被模型见过，因为我们的训练集是程序生成的。我们注意到，在大多数插值模块和两个外推模块上，各模块的损失与模型大小近似呈幂律关系。

items.capEn: Figure 24: Math difficulty levels— Here we show how performance of math models varies as a function of the difficulty level or ‘entropy’ of the problem distribution, with levels ≤10absent10\leq 10 represented in the training distribution. We note an observable kink at level 101010, suggesting some degree of overfitting, though as we extrapolate to more difficult problems the performance varies smoothly. It is clear that larger models perform better.
items.capZh: 图 24：数学难度级别——这里我们展示了数学模型性能如何随问题分布的难度级别或 '熵' 变化，级别 ≤10 出现在训练分布中。我们注意到在级别 10 处有一个明显的拐点，表明存在一定程度的过拟合，但随着我们外推到更难的问题，性能平滑变化。显然，更大的模型表现更好。

items.capEn: Figure 25: Model size trends for math difficulty levels— These plots show trends for the official interpolate dataset, as well as several difficulty levels that are within the training distribution. We observe that the power-law trends are distorted, perhaps as a consequence of memorization and the implicit curriculum in the data distribution.
items.capZh: 图 25：数学难度级别的模型大小趋势——这些图展示了官方插值数据集以及训练分布内若干难度级别的趋势。我们观察到幂律趋势发生扭曲，这可能是记忆化和数据分布中隐式课程的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 26: Extrapolation results for all math problem types— Here we show accuracies achieved by models of three different sizes on the official extrapolation test set files from [SGHK19], grouped by problem generator. Performance almost always improves with model size, though as shown in figure 13, this is due to the fact that larger models achieve better training loss.
items.capZh: 图 26：所有数学问题类型的外推结果——这里我们展示了三种不同大小模型在 [SGHK19] 官方外推测试集文件上按问题生成器分组的准确率。性能几乎总是随模型大小提升，但如图 13 所示，这是因为更大的模型实现了更好的训练损失。

items.capEn: Figure 27: Interpolation results for all math problem types— Here we show interpolation accuracies achieved by a 400M parameter model, by problem generator. Note that these problems (files from [SGHK19]) were not deduplicated from our procedurally generated training set, so they may be contaminated by memorization.
items.capZh: 图 27：所有数学问题类型的插值结果——这里我们展示了一个 400M 参数模型按问题生成器分组的插值准确率。注意，这些问题（来自 [SGHK19] 的文件）未从我们程序生成的训练集中去重，因此可能受到记忆化的污染。

full.secZh: 附录C 额外多模态结果

items.en: Here we show a few additional results on the multimodal experiments. The learning curves for the mutual information are shown in figure 29. This includes both training from scratch on a 95/5 mixture of captioned and blank-caption data for text-to-image, as well as finetuning for 10k steps on a 50/50 mixture for both multimodal directions. We compare the final mutual information and infogain for the two strategies in figure 28; they are very similar.
items.zh: 这里我们展示多模态实验的一些额外结果。互信息的学习曲线如图 29 所示。这包括从零开始在 95/5 的图文对和空白标题数据混合上训练文本到图像模型，以及在 50/50 混合上微调 10k 步用于两个多模态方向。我们在图 28 中比较了两种策略的最终互信息和信息增益；它们非常相似。

items.capEn: Figure 28: Mutual information In this plot we show the empirical mutual information for text-to-image multimodal models, as well as the Infogain, or the mutual information divided by the empirical entropy of the text.
items.capZh: 图 28：互信息——此图展示了文本到图像多模态模型的实证互信息，以及信息增益，即互信息除以文本的实证熵。

items.capEn: Figure 29: Mutual information learning curves— Here we show learning curves for the mutual information when either training or finetuning on a mixture of data with and without captions or images. We include training and finetuning on mixtures in order to ensure that our mutual information and Infogain estimates are not confounded by issues with blank captions or images being out of distribution.
items.capZh: 图 29：互信息学习曲线——这里我们展示了在包含和不包含标题或图像的数据混合上训练或微调时互信息的学习曲线。我们包含混合数据上的训练和微调，以确保我们的互信息和信息增益估计不受空白标题或图像分布外问题的混淆。

full.secZh: 附录D 额外语言结果

items.en: Here we show a few additional results on the language experiments that measure how performance improves with parameter count. In figure 30, we investigate the progression of arithmetic capabilities, and in figure 31 we measure the ability to answer a simple factual question. In both cases we find smooth improvement in the loss on the correct answer as the model size increases. However, we also observe some qualitative “phases of learning”, with small models having difficulty understanding the question being asked of them, larger models showing some rudimentary understanding, and the largest models correctly answering the questions.
items.zh: 这里我们展示语言实验的一些额外结果，这些实验衡量性能如何随参数数量提升。在图 30 中，我们研究了算术能力的进展，在图 31 中，我们衡量了回答简单事实问题的能力。在这两种情况下，我们发现正确答案的损失随模型大小增加而平滑改善。然而，我们也观察到一些定性的 '学习阶段'：小模型难以理解问题，较大模型显示出一些基本理解，而最大的模型正确回答问题。

items.capEn: Figure 30: Arithmetic— We show the progression of arithmetic capabilities of GPT-3 family models as we increase the parameter count [BMR+20] . We measure the probability of different numeric answers for a simple multiplication problem. On the top we show a heat-map of normalized probabilities for each model size, and on the bottom we show a line chart of un-normalized probabilities. The smallest models put some weight on small numbers near those in the question. Somewhat larger models start to put some weight on multiples on 4 and 6 (visible as bright vertical streaks on the heat map, and marked as red lines on the line plot), suggesting that they’ve started to understand the meaning of the multiplication question. The largest models choose the correct answer confidently.
items.capZh: 图 30：算术——我们展示了 GPT-3 系列模型算术能力随参数数量增加的进展 [BMR+20]。我们测量了一个简单乘法问题不同数值答案的概率。顶部展示了每个模型大小归一化概率的热图，底部展示了未归一化概率的折线图。最小的模型对问题中接近的小数字赋予了一些权重。稍大的模型开始对 4 和 6 的倍数赋予权重（在热图中可见为明亮的垂直条纹，在折线图中标记为红线），表明它们开始理解乘法问题的含义。最大的模型自信地选择了正确答案。

items.capEn: Figure 31: Q&A— We show the progression of simple Q&A capabilities of GPT-3 family models as we increase the parameter count [BMR+20]. We ask the model who the first and second president of the United States was. Tiny models appear to have trouble understanding the question, and don’t place any significant probability on the correct answer. Larger models understand that we’re requesting a US president, but fail to understand that the “second president” and “first president” are different requests, placing most of their weight for both questions on “George Washington”. Only larger models understand both aspects of the questions, answering both correctly.
items.capZh: 图 31：问答——我们展示了 GPT-3 系列模型简单问答能力随参数数量增加的进展 [BMR+20]。我们询问模型美国第一任和第二任总统是谁。极小的模型似乎难以理解问题，未对正确答案赋予显著概率。较大的模型理解我们要求的是美国总统，但未能理解 '第二任总统' 和 '第一任总统' 是不同的请求，对两个问题都将大部分权重放在 '乔治·华盛顿' 上。只有更大的模型理解了问题的两个方面，正确回答了这两个问题。

full.secZh: 附录E 互信息、信息增益与缩放

items.zh: 我们正在研究实证互信息

items.en: on either X𝑋X or Y𝑌Y, so that the empirical InfoGain in equation 1.3 cannot be greater than one. As with the usual mutual information, the empirical mutual information is maximized when y=f​(x)𝑦𝑓𝑥y=f(x) or vice versa, so that the relation between X𝑋X and Y𝑌Y is deterministic, and minimized when p​(x,y)=p​(x)​p​(y)𝑝𝑥𝑦𝑝𝑥𝑝𝑦p(x,y)=p(x)p(y).

items.en: However, it’s worth noting an interesting subtlety: in some cases it is possible for our evaluations to cause an apparent violation of the bound InfoGain <1absent1<1. This can occur in language models that are not precisely translation invariant when x=𝑥absentx= the first T𝑇T tokens while y=𝑦absenty= the following tokens. For example, it’s theoretically possible that a language model with limited computational resources would assign a higher probability to “The MD5 hash of ‘powerlaw’ is e9f7a4aafeda67a0dab579ba480c24d6” than to the sequence “e9f7a4aafeda67a0dab579ba480c24d6” by itself.
items.zh: 然而，值得注意的是一个有趣的微妙之处：在某些情况下，我们的评估可能导致信息增益 <1 的界限被明显违反。这可能发生在语言模型中，当 x=前 T 个 token 而 y=后续 token 时，模型并非精确的平移不变。例如，理论上，一个计算资源有限的语言模型可能对“The MD5 hash of ‘powerlaw’ is e9f7a4aafeda67a0dab579ba480c24d6”赋予比单独序列“e9f7a4aafeda67a0dab579ba480c24d6”更高的概率。

full.sec: E.1 Approximate Derivation of Scaling Relations
full.secZh: E.1 缩放关系的近似推导

items.en: We do not know how to derive the relation 4.1 for multimodal models. However, we can derive a similar relation for the mutual information and infogain in language models. In this case, we study the mutual information between the first T𝑇T tokens in a text sample, and the next T𝑇T tokens (it is easy to generalize to sequences of different lengths).
items.zh: 我们不知道如何推导多模态模型的公式 4.1。然而，我们可以推导语言模型中互信息和信息增益的类似关系。在这种情况下，我们研究文本样本中前 T 个 token 与后 T 个 token 之间的互信息（很容易推广到不同长度的序列）。

full.sec: E.2 Estimating DKLsubscript𝐷KLD_{\mathrm{KL}} Between Real-World Distributions
full.secZh: E.2 估计真实世界分布间的DKL

items.en: We have interpreted scaling trends in terms of the intrinsic entropy of the data distribution and the KL divergence between the true distribution and our models. This is based on the idea that with infinite data, model size, and compute we could model the data distribution exactly. If the empirical loss of our models on a new data distribution also follows a predictable scaling trend, then this means we can estimate the fundamental KL divergence between the new distribution and the training distribution. Since our models were trained on YFCC100M images [TSF+15], it’s interesting to examine the trends for the loss on ImageNet, as we would expect in the infinite limit
items.zh: 我们根据数据分布的内在熵以及真实分布与模型之间的 KL 散度来解释缩放趋势。这是基于以下想法：在无限数据、模型大小和算力下，我们可以精确建模数据分布。如果我们的模型在新数据分布上的经验损失也遵循可预测的缩放趋势，那么这意味着我们可以估计新分布与训练分布之间的基本 KL 散度。由于我们的模型是在 YFCC100M 图像 [TSF+15] 上训练的，检查 ImageNet 上损失的趋势很有趣，因为我们期望在无限极限下

items.en: where on the left we have the cross-entropy loss on ImageNet for a model trained on YFCC100M. We show the loss L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) when evaluating on ImageNet in figure 32, where we see that it appears to follow a power-law plus constant trend. Unfortunately this isn’t enough to identify DKL(ImageNet||YFCC100M)D_{\mathrm{KL}}({\rm ImageNet}||{\rm YFCC100M}) because we also need a separate estimate of S​(ImageNet)𝑆ImageNetS({\rm ImageNet}), but our techniques are not easily applied there due to overfitting. But this quantity might be extracted by studying dataset size scaling in the future.
items.zh: 其中左边是在 YFCC100M 上训练的模型在 ImageNet 上的交叉熵损失。我们在图 32 中展示了在 ImageNet 上评估时的损失 L(N)，我们看到它似乎遵循幂律加常数的趋势。不幸的是，这不足以确定 D_KL(ImageNet||YFCC100M)，因为我们还需要单独估计 S(ImageNet)，但由于过拟合，我们的技术不容易应用于此。但未来通过研究数据集大小缩放，或许可以提取这个量。

items.capEn: Figure 32: Generalization from YFC100M to ImageNet generation— We show information about evaluating YFCC100M-trained models on ImageNet data distribution. On the left we show that loss on ImageNet depends only on the loss on YFCC100M, and does not otherwise depend on model size. In the center we show ImageNet loss vs model size, and on the right we subtract the irreducible loss to compute the reducible loss. These results strongly suggest that L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) follows a power-law plus constant form, even somewhat off of the training distribution.
items.capZh: 图 32：从 YFCC100M 到 ImageNet 生成的泛化——我们展示了在 ImageNet 数据分布上评估 YFCC100M 训练模型的信息。左图显示 ImageNet 上的损失仅取决于 YFCC100M 上的损失，而不依赖于模型大小。中图显示 ImageNet 损失与模型大小的关系，右图减去不可约损失以计算可约损失。这些结果强烈表明 L(N) 遵循幂律加常数的形式，即使在训练分布之外也是如此。

full.secZh: 附录F 超参数设置

items.en: Here we include more details on the hyperparameter settings used to train the models.
items.zh: 这里我们提供了训练模型所用超参数设置的更多细节。

items.en: All models used a learning rate schedule with a 3000 step linear warm-up followed by a linear decay to 1/101101/10 of the maximum learning rate. Model hyperparmeters and learning rates are shown in tables 4 and 5. The number of attention heads was always chosen to be max​(2,dmodel/64)max2subscript𝑑model64\mathrm{max}(2,d_{\rm model}/64). Most models were trained with roughly 5×1055superscript1055\times 10^{5} tokens per batch; differences from this are noted in the captions of the tables below. ‘Parameters’ always refers to the non-embedding parameter counts, and is approximate (we do not include biases for simplicity).
items.zh: 所有模型都使用学习率调度，包括 3000 步线性预热，然后线性衰减到最大学习率的 1/10。模型超参数和学习率见表 4 和表 5。注意力头数始终选择为 max(2, d_model/64)。大多数模型以每批次约 5×10^5 个 token 进行训练；与此不同的情况在下面表格的标题中注明。“参数”始终指非嵌入参数计数，并且是近似的（为简单起见，我们不包含偏置）。

items.en: All models were trained for at least 250k steps (parameter updates), but many models were trained for significantly longer, as we noted that they had not yet reached the compute-efficient frontier, or did not seem to have converged. Trends in the loss as a function of model size were computed at the step minimizing the test loss. We used very similar learning rates for all models of a given size; these were determined through an initial grid search.
items.zh: 所有模型至少训练了 250k 步（参数更新），但许多模型训练了更长时间，因为我们注意到它们尚未达到计算高效前沿，或者似乎尚未收敛。损失随模型大小的趋势是在测试损失最小的步骤计算的。我们对给定大小的所有模型使用了非常相似的学习率；这些是通过初始网格搜索确定的。
